programme.title: World Insight with Tian Wei
programme.desc: World Insight with Tian Wei is a long-running international platform for debate and intelligent discussion. It is the meeting point of both the highly influential and rising voices, facilitated by host, Tian Wei. Live debates linking movers and shakers take place in the signature segment "Global Debate".

programme.title: The World Today
programme.desc: The core rolling news service of CGTN, with regular updates from Beijing, Washington, Nairobi and London, keep viewers up-to-date with all the world’s top stories as they happen. The World Today delivers breaking news, live events, in-depth reporting, expert analysis and sustained coverage.

programme.title: Dialogue
programme.desc: Dialogue is a prime time daily English talk show on CGTN. The 30-minute talk show covers a wide range of domestic and international topics, providing a balanced and critical perspective on current affairs and analysis within the framework of cross-cultural and multi-disciplinary comparisons. Inviting decision makers in government, business and academia onto the show, the host encourages guests to speak their minds frankly.

programme.title: Global Business
programme.desc: The flagship business program of CGTN’s English language service. Global Business shows you what's moving markets in both developed and emerging economies.

programme.title: 效廉出发吧！今天去哪玩
programme.desc: 这一趟到南投，威廉、小舜相揪到鱼池chill一下！威哥带着小舜一起到鱼池享受熟男行程，从绝美人气咖啡厅一路chill到底！甚至把五星料理搬上游艇，用全新视角畅游日月潭！两人逛伊达绍老街，一路遇粉丝老板热情招待，超美味总统鱼酥卷，不用进大餐厅就能吃的到！拳头大的高丽菜包让怕烫的威哥大口吃！鱼池这里竟然有媲美荷兰羊角村的美景？还有会跳舞的土地，让威廉差点深陷泥沼？！千万不要错过，更多精彩内容请锁定东森超视33频道周日晚间8点「效廉 出发吧！」。

programme.title: 效廉出发吧！今天去哪玩
programme.desc: 这一趟到南投，威廉、小舜相揪到鱼池chill一下！威哥带着小舜一起到鱼池享受熟男行程，从绝美人气咖啡厅一路chill到底！甚至把五星料理搬上游艇，用全新视角畅游日月潭！两人逛伊达绍老街，一路遇粉丝老板热情招待，超美味总统鱼酥卷，不用进大餐厅就能吃的到！拳头大的高丽菜包让怕烫的威哥大口吃！鱼池这里竟然有媲美荷兰羊角村的美景？还有会跳舞的土地，让威廉差点深陷泥沼？！千万不要错过，更多精彩内容请锁定东森超视33频道周日晚间8点「效廉 出发吧！」。

programme.title: Kansas City Finals: Part 1
programme.desc: The top 30 competitors from the Kansas City Qualifier tackle the Kansas City Finals course, which includes such obstacles as the Salmon Ladder, Flying Shelf Grab, Body Prop and Invisible Ladder.

programme.title: KNOCKOUTS! Arturo Gatti vs. Alfonso Gomez
programme.desc: The main event in this episode is Arturo Gatti facing off with Alfonso Gomez in what would be Gatti's final boxing match. Also on the card, Andre Berto takes on veteran Carlos Quintana on his way to stardom.

programme.title: Tokyo, Japan: Show 1
programme.desc: For the first time the top ranked sumo competitors in the world are featured in an action packed series, FIGHT SPORTS GRAND SUMO. This new format presents Sumo in an authentic, in-depth and entertaining way covering the rules, ranks, match-ups, and more. Show 1, from the Ryogoku Kokugikan Arena in Tokyo, Japan, features Takakeisho, Tokushoryu, Kagayaki and Enho.

programme.title: Macho: The Hector Camacho Story
programme.desc: This series takes a hard-hitting look at the rise, fall and untimely death of one of boxing's most colorful champions. Hector Camacho's dynamic speed, footwork and power made him a fighter to be reckoned with, but it was his flamboyance and showmanship that ushered in a new era in boxing. The series chronicles his epic battles inside the ring, his struggles with addiction outside of it and the mystery of the double homicide that claimed his life.

programme.title: Tuesday Night Fights Hector Camacho vs. Heath Todd
programme.desc: FIGHT SPORTS revisits some of Hector Camacho's best fights from the legendary USA's Tuesday Night Fights series alongside our new documentary series Macho: The Hector Camacho Story. In this episode Hector "Macho" Camacho (61-3-1 29 KO) vs. Heath Todd (32-10-0 13 KO) in a 10-round Halbmittel contest from the War Memorial Auditorium in Ft. Lauderdale FL USA.

programme.title: FIGHT SPORTS MMA JP Buys vs. Luthando Biko
programme.desc: This episode features a Bantamweight championship bout as current champion JP Buys faces off against interm champion Luthando Biko. Bonus coverage includes Shaun De Lange vs. Marcel Teniers and Wade Kerspuy vs. Josemar Octavio.

programme.title: MEGA Fights Sergio Martinez vs. Paul Williams II
programme.desc: MEGA Fights are premiere events from the sport of boxing including HBO World Championship Boxing and historic PPV events plus past, current and future World Champions. This episode features a WBC middleweight title bout between Sergio 'Maravilla' Martinez (45-2, 24 KOs) and Paul 'The Punisher' Williams (39-1, 27 KOs) from Boardwalk Hall in Atlantic City, New Jersey, USA, on November 20, 2010.

programme.title: MEGA Fights Yuriorkis Gamboa vs. Marcos Ramirez
programme.desc: MEGA Fights are premiere events from the sport of boxing including HBO World Championship Boxing and historic PPV events plus past, current and future World Champions. This episode features undefeated featherweights Yuriorkis Gamboa, 'El Cinclon de Guantanamo', (11-0, 9 KOs) and Marcos Ramirez (25-0, 16 KOs) from the Pechanga Resort and Casino in Temecula, California, USA, on October 4, 2008. The two young fighters had a quick ending street brawl that brought the crowd to its feet.

programme.title: Wide World of Fights Floyd Mayweather Jr vs. Oscar De La Hoya
programme.desc: This episode features the WBC World super welterweight title between Floyd Mayweather, Jr. and Oscar De La Hoya that made $165 million in total gross revenue, making it the richest fight ever, as well as kickboxing, sumo and more!

programme.title: Women's Sparring and Girl's Weapons
programme.desc: Featuring Women's CMX Form and Weapons and Girl's Weapons at the ISKA US Open from Disney, Orlando, Florida, USA.

programme.title: KNOCKOUTS! Shane Mosley vs. Floyd Mayweather, Jr.
programme.desc: The main event in this episode is a heavily-anticipated welterweight bout featuring Floyd Mayweather, Jr. and "Sugar" Shane Mosley. The fight, which generated $78 million in revenue, was Mayweather's first title fight since his comeback from his first retirement. Also on the card, heavyweight Bermane Stiverne and two-weight world champ Marcos Maidana.

programme.title: Tokyo, Japan: Show 2
programme.desc: For the first time the top ranked sumo competitors in the world are featured in an action packed series, FIGHT SPORTS GRAND SUMO. This new format presents Sumo in an authentic, in-depth and entertaining way covering the rules, ranks, match-ups, and more. Show 2, from the Ryogoku Kokugikan Arena in Tokyo, Japan, features Shohozan, Yutakayama, Endo and Okinoumi

programme.title: Zagreb Grand Prix
programme.desc: Judo for the World features the best competitors in the sport as they compete in a global tour for an opportunity to vie for the gold in the World Judo Championship. In this episode we see the best Judo from the Zagreb Grand Prix, where some of the young Judo fans get the opportunity to train with former Olympic champion Mark Huizinga and triple world champion Illias Iliadis. Plus we watch as Judo's biggest star Teddy Riner competes in the +100 kg division.

programme.title: Tito Ortiz, Donald Cerrone, Frank Mir and more!
programme.desc: This episode is highlighted by a heartfelt interview with the legendary MMA Hall of Famer Tito Ortiz that shows you sides of the former champ you never knew from his childhood to his love of fishing to the man he is today. We stop by "Cowboy" Donald Cerrone's ranch to see you don't need the flashiest training equipment to be a world class fighter. Plus Nate Marquardt gets his dream car and UFC ring girls bring us on a tour of a new gym.

programme.title: Gliding, Argentina
programme.desc: Glitch gatecrashes an academy gliding test, causing calamity in the skies over Argentina.

programme.title: Grudge Match
programme.desc: Raul, the Brazilian tank engine, wants to beat Thomas in a game. But Raul's super-competitive nature soon gets him into trouble.

programme.title: Seacow Snow Trail
programme.desc: Sarah and Duck are keen to find out who delivered their Christmas presents to them.

programme.title: Plate Escape
programme.desc: Sarah, Duck and Plate Girl find some unusual inhabitants in the Plant Section at the shop.

programme.title: Sophie Can Do
programme.desc: Stanley asks Sophie to help out with a few of his jobs whilst she waits for her dino costume to dry. The pair go about town fixing everyone's problems in fun and imaginative ways.

programme.title: Can-Bots
programme.desc: Stanley is very busy, so he invents three little robots called the Can Bots to help. They begin well but soon start getting out of hand. Stanley has some reprogramming to do.

programme.title: I Always Wanted to be a Crab
programme.desc: The talking animals talk about all the things they love about the ocean.

programme.title: It's Time to Braid Hair
programme.desc: At the salon, JoJo sees a picture of a girl with hair braids - time for a Gran Gran plan.

programme.title: The Decider
programme.desc: The Heelers and Lucky's family get together to watch the big game, a fun family experiences that gets a little tense.

programme.title: Cubby
programme.desc: Bluey and Bingo build a very special cubby for their stuffed toy Kimjim.

programme.title: Exercise
programme.desc: Dad thinks he needs to do some exercise, but Bingo pretends to be Boss Bluey's new employee in the middle of Dad's backyard workout.

programme.title: The Looking After Badge
programme.desc: Outside the clubhouse a large crowd has gathered around a hot air balloon with whisperings that someone is going on an adventure!

programme.title: The Organising Badge
programme.desc: Roly is trying to force a very large plastic ball into the bin, but it flies out and crashes into a tower that Betty has built.

programme.title: Squirrel Babies
programme.desc: Spring has sprung! There are cute baby animals to meet and frolic with.

programme.title: The Continent of Europe
programme.desc: The Go Jetters help Grandmaster Glitch take his own souvenir selfies across Europe.

programme.title: Garlic
programme.desc: Fitness guru, Garlic, has a set of fun exercises to make you stronger.

programme.title: Avocado
programme.desc: The fabulous Avocados sing an operatic piece in their three unique voices.

programme.title: The Throne Thief
programme.desc: Supertato, Carrot, Broccoli and Chilli are playing when, suddenly, they hear a scream and discover an upset Evil Pea in her freezer. Her throne has been stolen! Who would do such a thing?

programme.title: Broccoli Alone
programme.desc: Supertato is out chasing a milkshake robot and leaves Broccoli in charge of Tato Tower. Evil Pea tries to take over the tower, but Broccoli puts on a great defence.

programme.title: I Spy
programme.desc: The voice trumpet leads a game of 'I Spy' where the Teletubbies have to spot different colours - purple, green, yellow and red. What or who can they spot with those colours?

programme.title: Tiger
programme.desc: Dee encourages a friend to say 'tiger' and we go on a whirlwind word adventure! We see a stripy tiger, a swimming tiger, a cheeky tiger and Dee even has a tea party with a tiger!

programme.title: Memory Games
programme.desc: Messy goes to Okido and learns how to 'jog' his memory,

programme.title: Dewey Dragon
programme.desc: Preston is in costume as everyone's favourite character, Dewey Dragon, but he isn't ready for how demanding Dewey's fans are. Mojo and Bo need to help him escape the crowd.

programme.title: Dragon
programme.desc: When Bluey needs some assistance drawing a dragon for a story she is working on, she asks her dad, Bandit, for help.

programme.title: Show and Tell
programme.desc: Bluey wants to know why Dad's always bossing her around.

programme.title: The Metal Detector Badge
programme.desc: Roly needs a wee, but the door is locked and Duggee has mislaid the key. Not to worry, Duggee has his metal detector.

programme.title: The Diary Badge

programme.title: Donal Skehan: Home Cook (S1)
programme.desc: Donal is making dishes fit for entertaining - a baked cheesecake crowned with cherries, and crispy garlic chicken legs.

programme.title: Rome
programme.desc: Giorgio Locatelli and Fred roam Italy's capital in search of some classic 'Cucina Romana', from Bonci's legendary pizza and Tivoli's fluffiest gnocchi to one of San Paolo district's finest trattorias.

programme.desc: Join us as we take a look at a world of different luxuries each week. In this episode we get to peek inside the world's most luxurious private jets.

programme.desc: In this episode, George meets Dawn, who is hoping to breathe new life into her 19th-century village shop and create a beautiful new family home for her and her sons.

programme.title: Bake Off: The Professionals (S6)
programme.desc: In a 1920s-themed final, the teams create a dessert trolley adorned with sharing delights and an opulent banquet. Which team will be roaring with joy and be crowned the winner?

programme.title: The Graham Norton Show (S33)
programme.desc: Graham Norton presents a lively chat show featuring Bruce Springsteen, Jeremy Allen White, Jennifer Lawrence, Tessa Thompson and Florence + The Machine.

programme.title: Hidden Treasures
programme.desc: We explore some of the most valuable treasures found in the most unlikely of ways. Like an Ancient Roman mosaic hiding in an apartment, or a valuable piece of Americana tucked away in a flea market.

programme.title: Opportunity Cost
programme.desc: As five new survivalists begin their first days in the Mackenzie River Delta, they are met with an abundance of challenges in the uncharted Arctic terrain.

programme.title: Let Them Bake Cake
programme.desc: During the mid-20th century, two unlikely characters find themselves in competition to simplify the lives of homemakers across the country by creating a tasty but easy boxed cake mix.

programme.title: The Bermuda Triangle And The Beyond
programme.desc: All over the world are forbidden 'triangles' - mysterious regions where ships, planes, and people enter and then just disappear. They are found in Bermuda, Alaska, Japan and elsewhere. But why?

programme.title: Let Them Bake Cake
programme.desc: During the mid-20th century, two unlikely characters find themselves in competition to simplify the lives of homemakers across the country by creating a tasty but easy boxed cake mix.

programme.desc: In the late 1800s, two pharmacists 1500 miles apart race to create healthy, non-alcoholic beverage options, kickstarting the entire soda industry with their breakout hits: Hires Root Beer and Dr. Pepper.

programme.title: Wonders Of The Ancient World
programme.desc: Remarkable feats of engineering from our ancient past span the globe. Some are amazing in size. Others in sophistication. Some are so strange they border on inexplicable.

programme.title: Yay Or Neigh?

programme.title: Looking Back And Far Beyond
programme.desc: Dr. Travis Taylor relives the most shocking and compelling phenomena that have taken place in the past year on Skinwalker Ranch.

programme.title: Mad Medicine
programme.desc: Ever taken medical advice from a cigarette commercial? There was a time when any and all 'cures' could be sold to the public indiscriminately.

programme.title: Astonishing Feats
programme.desc: History is full of people pushing the limits. Like the man who single-handedly liberated a town during World War II. Or an epic robbery in Buenos Aires that was pulled off with zero casualties.

programme.title: The Hindenburg Disaster
programme.desc: For decades, experts believed they knew what caused the Hindenburg disaster: that leaking hydrogen ignited. But there may be more to this story. What caused the Hindenburg disaster?

programme.title: Sinister Spy Weapons
programme.desc: An exploration into the dark art of spycraft. From the frankenkitty to the umbrella gun, we'll reveal the deadliest spy weapons deployed to gather information and assassinate enemies.

programme.title: Finding A Foothold
programme.desc: As the tumultuous first week nears its end, the remaining survivalists focus on regaining their footing. One participant discovers unconventional food sources to adapt to the harsh environment.

programme.title: What We Know with Max Foster
programme.desc: Max Foster has a definitive roundup of the day's top stories, giving you the urgent need-to-know context, plus a deeper dive into the questions sparking debate around the world.

programme.title: The Brief with Jim Sciutto
programme.desc: The best of CNN's reporting from correspondents across the world, to guide global audiences through the fast-paced news cycle with insight, analysis and hard-hitting interviews.

programme.title: Erin Burnett OutFront
programme.desc: Erin Burnett stays ahead of the headlines, delivering a show that's in-depth and informative.

programme.title: Laura Coates Live
programme.desc: Laura Coates goes inside the story with a relentless pursuit of the facts.

programme.title: The Story Is With Elex Michaelson
programme.desc: Elex Michaelson tackles the breaking stories making headlines with sharp analysis, fresh perspective, and a dose of humor.

programme.title: CNN Newsroom (CNNI) (60m)
programme.desc: Live context and clarity to the day's top stories from around the world.

programme.title: Amanpour
programme.desc: Christiane Amanpour provides her powerful interview skills and provocative analysis on global stories that matter to you.

programme.title: Early Start with Rahel Solomon
programme.desc: The news you need, first thing. Rahel Solomon has you covered with the latest headlines.

programme.title: CNN This Morning
programme.desc: Start your day with Audie Cornish bringing you the latest headlines and analysis.

programme.title: CNN News Central
programme.desc: Stay up to date with John Berman, Kate Bolduan and Sara Sidner from CNN's immersive news hub.

programme.title: World Sport (15m)
programme.desc: Daily sports show features major stories and issues making news in the world of sports.

programme.title: 远方的家
programme.desc: 节目通过旅行者深度游来表现中国的自然和人文之美及中国人眼中的世界之美，反映当代中国人旅行态度和生活观念的变化。

programme.title: 收视指南
programme.desc: 中国中央电视台中文国际频道（CCTV-4）是中央电视台唯一一个面向全球播出的中文频道。《收视指南》栏目专门介绍央视的播出内容。

programme.title: 中国新闻
programme.desc: 《中国新闻》是以海外华人华侨、港澳台同胞、留学生、驻外使领馆及中资机构人员为目标受众的综合性新闻栏目。栏目由国内外要闻、中国内地经济和社会新闻、对国内外重要新闻事件的分析和评论组成。

programme.title: 今日关注
programme.desc: 《今日关注》紧密跟踪国内外重大新闻事件、新闻话题，邀请国内外一流的专家和高级官员，梳理新闻来龙去脉，分析新闻背后的新闻，评论新闻事件的影响和发展趋势。

programme.title: 记住乡愁
programme.desc: 以弘扬中华优秀传统文化为宗旨，以传统村落为载体，以生活化的故事为依托，以乡愁为情感基础，以优秀的传统文化为核心，展现传统村落的自然环境、人文景观、民风民俗、乡土之物、文化积淀等。

programme.title: 走遍中国
programme.desc: 主要以中国的某一城市（或地域、或主题）为选题范围，选取其最具的历史传承、风土人情、杰出人物、自然风光和发展变化以连续一周每天30分钟播出的大容量，向世界全景式地展现新世纪的中国城市（或地域）形象。

programme.title: 海峡两岸
programme.desc: 节目宗旨是"跟踪海峡热点，反映两岸民意"，节目分为两个版块：第一个是"热点扫描"，主要报道当日的近期台湾岛内的热点新闻；第二个是"热点透视"，当日或近期涉台热点深度报道及两岸专家对此事的评论，并对两岸各个层面的交流交往进行跟踪报道。

programme.title: 亚洲财经透视

programme.title: 总编辑时间 (17/4/26)

programme.title: 时事直通车 (17/4/26)
programme.desc: 在亚、欧、美三大洲拥有直播站和全球完善报导网络，又有众多驻外记者和阵容鼎盛的主播，收看凤凰卫视便俨如坐上一列资讯直通车。直通车为您送上当日各地头条要闻。

programme.title: 天命
programme.desc: 和珅(陈展鹏)相中皇子永琰(谭俊彦)为皇帝。乾隆驾崩后，嘉庆帝说服和珅儿子丰绅殷德(何广沛)以及心腹福长安(陈山聪)倒戈，意图歼灭和珅及其党羽。然而和珅早有对策，不但化解嘉庆攻击；更反客为主，揭出皇贵妃(李施嬅)秘密，令嘉庆腹背受敌！_x000D__x000D_和珅二夫人长媚(姚子羚)和红颜知己豆蔻(唐诗咏)亦分头行事，令嘉庆亲弟永璘(张颕康)与之反目成仇，而白莲教也在江湖上兴风作浪，令嘉庆陷入绝境。岂料天命难违……

programme.title: 阖府统请
programme.desc: 德（王喜）天生厨艺天份，在舅父季（刘家辉）鼓励下，欲投身饮食行业，唯其父坚（梁家仁）却断言不允。德无奈放弃，为此郁郁不乐，幸得青梅竹马好友琳（袁洁莹）在旁开解。经多番努力，德终获坚批准，进入一酒店中菜部学厨，期间德邂逅咏（郭可盈），力加追求，终以真诚打动之，琳得悉黯然失落。_x000D__x000D_一次偶然，德结识酒店太干爷豪（魏骏杰），成为好友。二人与另一好友礼（张兆辉）雄心壮志，合力经营食肆，意外地闯出名堂。此时，德向咏求婚，咏不欲承担冢庭重任，毅然与德分手。德失落，琳加以扶持，二人终开展一段真挚的感情。德声名日噪，豪因觉地位被忽略而渐生妒忌，竟萌损德之念。究竟德又如何应付呢？

programme.title: 阖府统请
programme.desc: 德（王喜）天生厨艺天份，在舅父季（刘家辉）鼓励下，欲投身饮食行业，唯其父坚（梁家仁）却断言不允。德无奈放弃，为此郁郁不乐，幸得青梅竹马好友琳（袁洁莹）在旁开解。经多番努力，德终获坚批准，进入一酒店中菜部学厨，期间德邂逅咏（郭可盈），力加追求，终以真诚打动之，琳得悉黯然失落。_x000D__x000D_一次偶然，德结识酒店太干爷豪（魏骏杰），成为好友。二人与另一好友礼（张兆辉）雄心壮志，合力经营食肆，意外地闯出名堂。此时，德向咏求婚，咏不欲承担冢庭重任，毅然与德分手。德失落，琳加以扶持，二人终开展一段真挚的感情。德声名日噪，豪因觉地位被忽略而渐生妒忌，竟萌损德之念。究竟德又如何应付呢？

programme.title: 新同居关系
programme.desc: 文（郭晋安）、辉（吴镇宇）、华（关咏荷）、珊（袁洁莹）四人自小相识，感情融洽，珊、文、辉更分租一屋一起共住。_x000D__x000D_辉性格花弗，崇尚自由享乐，不甘受束缚，身边不断转换女伴；文与华为一对恋人，多年来文始终只有华这个女友，虽然常被损友怂恿偷欢猎艳，但文只会心动而没有实际行动。_x000D__x000D_文、辉一直视珊为男仔头，但珊却不知不觉地暗恋辉，二人关系在友谊与爱情之间纠缠不清。此际，文与华之感情又出现矛盾，面临分手。一时之间，辉、珊、文、华均陷于感情迷阵中，不知所惜！

programme.title: 公主嫁到
programme.desc: 刁蛮任性的昭阳公主(佘诗曼)为避嫁吐蕃急招驸马，一代金店掌舵人丁来喜(关菊英)主动送上门，因二儿子金多禄(陈豪)及叁儿子金多寿(黄浩然)均属单身，希望藉此解决金店面临的财困危机。兄弟情深，多禄为救家业，主动答应亲事。谁料公主过门后尽显骄横跋扈本色，要求金家上下向她行君臣之礼，金家至高的精神领袖金太夫人(李香琴)也难逃一劫，公主的心腹侍婢司徒银屏(陈法拉)更不可一世，尊卑不分，连官媒丁有维(马国明)也不放眼内；金家各人不甘受屈，合力反抗，但金家出名的大力丫环吴四德(钟嘉欣)却倒戈相向，与公主站在同一阵线。公主斗驸马，叁合叁离，各施各法，最后更闹上皇宫，要由太宗亲自平息风波……娶得皇帝女，当然想夫凭妻贵；但娶着这位野蛮公主，又岂能百忍成金？

programme.title: 法言人
programme.desc: 金秉信(马国明饰)本是法律系高材生，却因一次冤狱而决定开启法律行政人员之路。凭借八面玲珑的处事手腕，秉信逐渐建立「金师爷」的金漆招牌。金师爷任职的律师楼突然面临倒闭，他运用人脉化解危局，还获律师田佑家(林夏薇饰)、庾国栋(黄嘉乐饰)加盟共事，并与大状马玮雄(张颕康饰)组成新的法律界「最强CP」，解决各宗错综复杂的案件。及后，金师爷竟再度成为犯人栏内的被告，纵得叁位知心好友全力支持，庭上仍处下风。到底金师爷一方最终能否逆转官司，继续以法律发言，为公义发声？

programme.title: 天命
programme.desc: 和珅(陈展鹏)相中皇子永琰(谭俊彦)为皇帝。乾隆驾崩后，嘉庆帝说服和珅儿子丰绅殷德(何广沛)以及心腹福长安(陈山聪)倒戈，意图歼灭和珅及其党羽。然而和珅早有对策，不但化解嘉庆攻击；更反客为主，揭出皇贵妃(李施嬅)秘密，令嘉庆腹背受敌！_x000D__x000D_和珅二夫人长媚(姚子羚)和红颜知己豆蔻(唐诗咏)亦分头行事，令嘉庆亲弟永璘(张颕康)与之反目成仇，而白莲教也在江湖上兴风作浪，令嘉庆陷入绝境。岂料天命难违……

programme.title: 阖府统请
programme.desc: 德（王喜）天生厨艺天份，在舅父季（刘家辉）鼓励下，欲投身饮食行业，唯其父坚（梁家仁）却断言不允。德无奈放弃，为此郁郁不乐，幸得青梅竹马好友琳（袁洁莹）在旁开解。经多番努力，德终获坚批准，进入一酒店中菜部学厨，期间德邂逅咏（郭可盈），力加追求，终以真诚打动之，琳得悉黯然失落。_x000D__x000D_一次偶然，德结识酒店太干爷豪（魏骏杰），成为好友。二人与另一好友礼（张兆辉）雄心壮志，合力经营食肆，意外地闯出名堂。此时，德向咏求婚，咏不欲承担冢庭重任，毅然与德分手。德失落，琳加以扶持，二人终开展一段真挚的感情。德声名日噪，豪因觉地位被忽略而渐生妒忌，竟萌损德之念。究竟德又如何应付呢？

programme.title: 阖府统请
programme.desc: 德（王喜）天生厨艺天份，在舅父季（刘家辉）鼓励下，欲投身饮食行业，唯其父坚（梁家仁）却断言不允。德无奈放弃，为此郁郁不乐，幸得青梅竹马好友琳（袁洁莹）在旁开解。经多番努力，德终获坚批准，进入一酒店中菜部学厨，期间德邂逅咏（郭可盈），力加追求，终以真诚打动之，琳得悉黯然失落。_x000D__x000D_一次偶然，德结识酒店太干爷豪（魏骏杰），成为好友。二人与另一好友礼（张兆辉）雄心壮志，合力经营食肆，意外地闯出名堂。此时，德向咏求婚，咏不欲承担冢庭重任，毅然与德分手。德失落，琳加以扶持，二人终开展一段真挚的感情。德声名日噪，豪因觉地位被忽略而渐生妒忌，竟萌损德之念。究竟德又如何应付呢？

programme.title: 新同居关系
programme.desc: 文（郭晋安）、辉（吴镇宇）、华（关咏荷）、珊（袁洁莹）四人自小相识，感情融洽，珊、文、辉更分租一屋一起共住。_x000D__x000D_辉性格花弗，崇尚自由享乐，不甘受束缚，身边不断转换女伴；文与华为一对恋人，多年来文始终只有华这个女友，虽然常被损友怂恿偷欢猎艳，但文只会心动而没有实际行动。_x000D__x000D_文、辉一直视珊为男仔头，但珊却不知不觉地暗恋辉，二人关系在友谊与爱情之间纠缠不清。此际，文与华之感情又出现矛盾，面临分手。一时之间，辉、珊、文、华均陷于感情迷阵中，不知所惜！

programme.title: 公主嫁到
programme.desc: 刁蛮任性的昭阳公主(佘诗曼)为避嫁吐蕃急招驸马，一代金店掌舵人丁来喜(关菊英)主动送上门，因二儿子金多禄(陈豪)及叁儿子金多寿(黄浩然)均属单身，希望藉此解决金店面临的财困危机。兄弟情深，多禄为救家业，主动答应亲事。谁料公主过门后尽显骄横跋扈本色，要求金家上下向她行君臣之礼，金家至高的精神领袖金太夫人(李香琴)也难逃一劫，公主的心腹侍婢司徒银屏(陈法拉)更不可一世，尊卑不分，连官媒丁有维(马国明)也不放眼内；金家各人不甘受屈，合力反抗，但金家出名的大力丫环吴四德(钟嘉欣)却倒戈相向，与公主站在同一阵线。公主斗驸马，叁合叁离，各施各法，最后更闹上皇宫，要由太宗亲自平息风波……娶得皇帝女，当然想夫凭妻贵；但娶着这位野蛮公主，又岂能百忍成金？

programme.title: 法言人
programme.desc: 金秉信(马国明饰)本是法律系高材生，却因一次冤狱而决定开启法律行政人员之路。凭借八面玲珑的处事手腕，秉信逐渐建立「金师爷」的金漆招牌。金师爷任职的律师楼突然面临倒闭，他运用人脉化解危局，还获律师田佑家(林夏薇饰)、庾国栋(黄嘉乐饰)加盟共事，并与大状马玮雄(张颕康饰)组成新的法律界「最强CP」，解决各宗错综复杂的案件。及后，金师爷竟再度成为犯人栏内的被告，纵得叁位知心好友全力支持，庭上仍处下风。到底金师爷一方最终能否逆转官司，继续以法律发言，为公义发声？

programme.title: 天命
programme.desc: 和珅(陈展鹏)相中皇子永琰(谭俊彦)为皇帝。乾隆驾崩后，嘉庆帝说服和珅儿子丰绅殷德(何广沛)以及心腹福长安(陈山聪)倒戈，意图歼灭和珅及其党羽。然而和珅早有对策，不但化解嘉庆攻击；更反客为主，揭出皇贵妃(李施嬅)秘密，令嘉庆腹背受敌！_x000D__x000D_和珅二夫人长媚(姚子羚)和红颜知己豆蔻(唐诗咏)亦分头行事，令嘉庆亲弟永璘(张颕康)与之反目成仇，而白莲教也在江湖上兴风作浪，令嘉庆陷入绝境。岂料天命难违……

programme.title: 酒店风云
programme.desc: 酒店大亨王玉廷离世后，王家随即掀起一场争产战，叁子启杰(吴卓羲)离家出走，杰母遭两位同父异母的兄长迫走。更甚者，杰此时发现父亲早已将名下酒店股份转给了一个名叫高峰(马德钟)的人！_x000D__x000D_ 原来峰是为报仇而来，誓要将酒店得到手。危城告急，叁兄弟将个人恩怨放下，更不惜拉拢对王家产业一直虎视眈眈的舅父郑永发(姜大伟)连手对付峰。惟峰为人心狠手辣，众人被逐一打垮。_x000D__x000D_ 峰在王氏集团的地位稳如泰山之际，赫然发现女友顾碧琦(郭可盈)走近自己原来别有用心……

programme.title: 新同居关系

programme.desc: 和珅(陈展鹏)相中皇子永琰(谭俊彦)为皇帝。乾隆驾崩后，嘉庆帝说服和珅儿子丰绅殷德(何广沛)以及心腹福长安(陈山聪)倒戈，意图歼灭和珅及其党羽。然而和珅早有对策，不但化解嘉庆攻击；更反客为主，揭出皇贵妃(李施嬅)秘密，令嘉庆腹背受敌！_x000D__x000D_和珅二夫人长媚(姚子羚)和红颜知己豆蔻(唐诗咏)亦分头行事，令嘉庆亲弟永璘(张颕康)与之反目成仇，而白莲教也在江湖上兴风作浪，令嘉庆陷入绝境。岂料天命难违……

programme.title: 阖府统请
programme.desc: 德（王喜）天生厨艺天份，在舅父季（刘家辉）鼓励下，欲投身饮食行业，唯其父坚（梁家仁）却断言不允。德无奈放弃，为此郁郁不乐，幸得青梅竹马好友琳（袁洁莹）在旁开解。经多番努力，德终获坚批准，进入一酒店中菜部学厨，期间德邂逅咏（郭可盈），力加追求，终以真诚打动之，琳得悉黯然失落。_x000D__x000D_一次偶然，德结识酒店太干爷豪（魏骏杰），成为好友。二人与另一好友礼（张兆辉）雄心壮志，合力经营食肆，意外地闯出名堂。此时，德向咏求婚，咏不欲承担冢庭重任，毅然与德分手。德失落，琳加以扶持，二人终开展一段真挚的感情。德声名日噪，豪因觉地位被忽略而渐生妒忌，竟萌损德之念。究竟德又如何应付呢？

programme.title: 酒店风云
programme.desc: 酒店大亨王玉廷离世后，王家随即掀起一场争产战，叁子启杰(吴卓羲)离家出走，杰母遭两位同父异母的兄长迫走。更甚者，杰此时发现父亲早已将名下酒店股份转给了一个名叫高峰(马德钟)的人！_x000D__x000D_ 原来峰是为报仇而来，誓要将酒店得到手。危城告急，叁兄弟将个人恩怨放下，更不惜拉拢对王家产业一直虎视眈眈的舅父郑永发(姜大伟)连手对付峰。惟峰为人心狠手辣，众人被逐一打垮。_x000D__x000D_ 峰在王氏集团的地位稳如泰山之际，赫然发现女友顾碧琦(郭可盈)走近自己原来别有用心……

programme.title: 新同居关系
programme.desc: 文（郭晋安）、辉（吴镇宇）、华（关咏荷）、珊（袁洁莹）四人自小相识，感情融洽，珊、文、辉更分租一屋一起共住。_x000D__x000D_辉性格花弗，崇尚自由享乐，不甘受束缚，身边不断转换女伴；文与华为一对恋人，多年来文始终只有华这个女友，虽然常被损友怂恿偷欢猎艳，但文只会心动而没有实际行动。_x000D__x000D_文、辉一直视珊为男仔头，但珊却不知不觉地暗恋辉，二人关系在友谊与爱情之间纠缠不清。此际，文与华之感情又出现矛盾，面临分手。一时之间，辉、珊、文、华均陷于感情迷阵中，不知所惜！

programme.title: 公主嫁到
programme.desc: 刁蛮任性的昭阳公主(佘诗曼)为避嫁吐蕃急招驸马，一代金店掌舵人丁来喜(关菊英)主动送上门，因二儿子金多禄(陈豪)及叁儿子金多寿(黄浩然)均属单身，希望藉此解决金店面临的财困危机。兄弟情深，多禄为救家业，主动答应亲事。谁料公主过门后尽显骄横跋扈本色，要求金家上下向她行君臣之礼，金家至高的精神领袖金太夫人(李香琴)也难逃一劫，公主的心腹侍婢司徒银屏(陈法拉)更不可一世，尊卑不分，连官媒丁有维(马国明)也不放眼内；金家各人不甘受屈，合力反抗，但金家出名的大力丫环吴四德(钟嘉欣)却倒戈相向，与公主站在同一阵线。公主斗驸马，叁合叁离，各施各法，最后更闹上皇宫，要由太宗亲自平息风波……娶得皇帝女，当然想夫凭妻贵；但娶着这位野蛮公主，又岂能百忍成金？

programme.title: 法言人
programme.desc: 金秉信(马国明饰)本是法律系高材生，却因一次冤狱而决定开启法律行政人员之路。凭借八面玲珑的处事手腕，秉信逐渐建立「金师爷」的金漆招牌。金师爷任职的律师楼突然面临倒闭，他运用人脉化解危局，还获律师田佑家(林夏薇饰)、庾国栋(黄嘉乐饰)加盟共事，并与大状马玮雄(张颕康饰)组成新的法律界「最强CP」，解决各宗错综复杂的案件。及后，金师爷竟再度成为犯人栏内的被告，纵得叁位知心好友全力支持，庭上仍处下风。到底金师爷一方最终能否逆转官司，继续以法律发言，为公义发声？

programme.title: 天命
programme.desc: 和珅(陈展鹏)相中皇子永琰(谭俊彦)为皇帝。乾隆驾崩后，嘉庆帝说服和珅儿子丰绅殷德(何广沛)以及心腹福长安(陈山聪)倒戈，意图歼灭和珅及其党羽。然而和珅早有对策，不但化解嘉庆攻击；更反客为主，揭出皇贵妃(李施嬅)秘密，令嘉庆腹背受敌！_x000D__x000D_和珅二夫人长媚(姚子羚)和红颜知己豆蔻(唐诗咏)亦分头行事，令嘉庆亲弟永璘(张颕康)与之反目成仇，而白莲教也在江湖上兴风作浪，令嘉庆陷入绝境。岂料天命难违……

programme.title: 酒店风云
programme.desc: 酒店大亨王玉廷离世后，王家随即掀起一场争产战，叁子启杰(吴卓羲)离家出走，杰母遭两位同父异母的兄长迫走。更甚者，杰此时发现父亲早已将名下酒店股份转给了一个名叫高峰(马德钟)的人！_x000D__x000D_ 原来峰是为报仇而来，誓要将酒店得到手。危城告急，叁兄弟将个人恩怨放下，更不惜拉拢对王家产业一直虎视眈眈的舅父郑永发(姜大伟)连手对付峰。惟峰为人心狠手辣，众人被逐一打垮。_x000D__x000D_ 峰在王氏集团的地位稳如泰山之际，赫然发现女友顾碧琦(郭可盈)走近自己原来别有用心……

programme.title: 银楼金粉
programme.desc: 广东佛山第一大银楼『尚银楼』面临生意危机，大老爷尚铿(秦沛)为取得沈家借贷，不惜与正室赛小蝶(薛家燕)施计强逼二少爷尚鋆(伍卫国)与沈家千金沈咏彤(杨婉仪)成亲，令鋆的意中人程秀杏(伍咏薇)一怒之下嫁入尚家做叁姨太。鋆从此与铿反目成仇，远渡重洋，兄弟不相往还。直至老太爷大寿那天，鋆始肯回家，但小儿子突遭绑架，铿不愿交出赎金，令兄弟再起冲突，鋆决意分家。_x000D__x000D_另方面，自鋆回来后，一直被铿冷落的杏面对着二叔深感痛苦，又被诬告害至四姨太霏霏(胡定欣)小产，杏痛定思痛向尚家进行报复，利用鋆之余情，暗中撩弄尚家上下，又揭发近身丫环秋菊(杨思琦)原是铿与有夫之妇留下的孽种，连串打击令一代豪门声名狼藉，万劫不复......

programme.title: 锦绣良缘
programme.desc: 程家世代经营染布业，程父与元配早逝，程二太太上官丹凤﹝黄淑仪﹞一直当家作主，把家业打理得井井有条。_x000D__x000D_长子智盛﹝罗莽﹞性格戆直，娶得贤妻周梦娴﹝苏玉华﹞。次子智博﹝阮兆祥﹞为人急功近利，和锱铢必较的妻子薛小小﹝郭少芸﹞是对欢喜冤家。叁子智勇﹝郑中基﹞心地善良但只管吃喝玩乐，其妻郑艳﹝梅小惠﹞为人势利却爱夫心切。四子智轩博学多闻、温文尔雅，却要奉皇上圣旨跟率性不羁的吐蕃女子顿珠﹝文颂娴﹞成婚。智轩和顿珠性格迥异，时有争执，二人不但无夫妻之实，而且常常斗气，因而闹出不少笑话来。期间，智轩爱上女子周梦诗﹝邝文珣﹞，顿珠大方地从中撮合，智轩心存感激。及后梦诗移情别恋，智轩若有所失，顿珠从旁安慰，二人竟又渐生情愫。程家因得罪权贵而尽失祖业，智轩更因一个惊人的秘密而惹来杀身之祸……

programme.title: 点金胜手
programme.desc: 金融大鳄卓彧(黄宗泽)为求利益不惜踩钢线耍手段，一直备受商业罪案调查科高度监视，卓彧沉迷金钱和权力游戏忽略家人和朋友，妻子和良师先后因他离世，他毫无悔意，反而变本加厉，大舅周辛勇(黄智贤)身为商业罪案调查科人员誓要将他绳之于法，上司何双怡(陈敏之)和下属资雅(徐子珊)协力找寻证据，辛勇对资雅本寄望甚殷，视她为入室弟子，但资雅却突然离职转投卓彧的公司，先取得卓彧第二任妻子方明瑜(胡定欣)的信心，继而帮助卓彧对付金融界女强人柴沛勋(江美仪)，资雅几乎左右大局，卓彧的雄心壮志似被吞噬，充满杀戮的金融战场上，胜负最后谁来定夺……

programme.title: 点金胜手
programme.desc: 金融大鳄卓彧(黄宗泽)为求利益不惜踩钢线耍手段，一直备受商业罪案调查科高度监视，卓彧沉迷金钱和权力游戏忽略家人和朋友，妻子和良师先后因他离世，他毫无悔意，反而变本加厉，大舅周辛勇(黄智贤)身为商业罪案调查科人员誓要将他绳之于法，上司何双怡(陈敏之)和下属资雅(徐子珊)协力找寻证据，辛勇对资雅本寄望甚殷，视她为入室弟子，但资雅却突然离职转投卓彧的公司，先取得卓彧第二任妻子方明瑜(胡定欣)的信心，继而帮助卓彧对付金融界女强人柴沛勋(江美仪)，资雅几乎左右大局，卓彧的雄心壮志似被吞噬，充满杀戮的金融战场上，胜负最后谁来定夺……

programme.title: 争霸
programme.desc: 春秋战国时代，各路诸侯各据一方。多少奇情，都在那个充满变数的处境里一一展示。范蠡(陈坤)、勾践(刘松仁)和夫差(马德钟)叁人之间长达二十多年的斗智斗力 ─ 侠骨丹心的范蠡、卧薪尝胆的勾践、一代枭雄的夫差、还有倾国倾城的大美人西施(郭羡妮)……_x000D__x000D_二千五百多年前的故事看似遥远，但当中主角那份对理想的坚持，不屈不朽的精神，可歌可泣的故事，传诵至今，仍为人津津乐道。

programme.title: 争霸
programme.desc: 春秋战国时代，各路诸侯各据一方。多少奇情，都在那个充满变数的处境里一一展示。范蠡(陈坤)、勾践(刘松仁)和夫差(马德钟)叁人之间长达二十多年的斗智斗力 ─ 侠骨丹心的范蠡、卧薪尝胆的勾践、一代枭雄的夫差、还有倾国倾城的大美人西施(郭羡妮)……_x000D__x000D_二千五百多年前的故事看似遥远，但当中主角那份对理想的坚持，不屈不朽的精神，可歌可泣的故事，传诵至今，仍为人津津乐道。

programme.title: 银楼金粉
programme.desc: 广东佛山第一大银楼『尚银楼』面临生意危机，大老爷尚铿(秦沛)为取得沈家借贷，不惜与正室赛小蝶(薛家燕)施计强逼二少爷尚鋆(伍卫国)与沈家千金沈咏彤(杨婉仪)成亲，令鋆的意中人程秀杏(伍咏薇)一怒之下嫁入尚家做叁姨太。鋆从此与铿反目成仇，远渡重洋，兄弟不相往还。直至老太爷大寿那天，鋆始肯回家，但小儿子突遭绑架，铿不愿交出赎金，令兄弟再起冲突，鋆决意分家。_x000D__x000D_另方面，自鋆回来后，一直被铿冷落的杏面对着二叔深感痛苦，又被诬告害至四姨太霏霏(胡定欣)小产，杏痛定思痛向尚家进行报复，利用鋆之余情，暗中撩弄尚家上下，又揭发近身丫环秋菊(杨思琦)原是铿与有夫之妇留下的孽种，连串打击令一代豪门声名狼藉，万劫不复......

programme.title: 锦绣良缘
programme.desc: 程家世代经营染布业，程父与元配早逝，程二太太上官丹凤﹝黄淑仪﹞一直当家作主，把家业打理得井井有条。_x000D__x000D_长子智盛﹝罗莽﹞性格戆直，娶得贤妻周梦娴﹝苏玉华﹞。次子智博﹝阮兆祥﹞为人急功近利，和锱铢必较的妻子薛小小﹝郭少芸﹞是对欢喜冤家。叁子智勇﹝郑中基﹞心地善良但只管吃喝玩乐，其妻郑艳﹝梅小惠﹞为人势利却爱夫心切。四子智轩博学多闻、温文尔雅，却要奉皇上圣旨跟率性不羁的吐蕃女子顿珠﹝文颂娴﹞成婚。智轩和顿珠性格迥异，时有争执，二人不但无夫妻之实，而且常常斗气，因而闹出不少笑话来。期间，智轩爱上女子周梦诗﹝邝文珣﹞，顿珠大方地从中撮合，智轩心存感激。及后梦诗移情别恋，智轩若有所失，顿珠从旁安慰，二人竟又渐生情愫。程家因得罪权贵而尽失祖业，智轩更因一个惊人的秘密而惹来杀身之祸……

programme.desc: 金融大鳄卓彧(黄宗泽)为求利益不惜踩钢线耍手段，一直备受商业罪案调查科高度监视，卓彧沉迷金钱和权力游戏忽略家人和朋友，妻子和良师先后因他离世，他毫无悔意，反而变本加厉，大舅周辛勇(黄智贤)身为商业罪案调查科人员誓要将他绳之于法，上司何双怡(陈敏之)和下属资雅(徐子珊)协力找寻证据，辛勇对资雅本寄望甚殷，视她为入室弟子，但资雅却突然离职转投卓彧的公司，先取得卓彧第二任妻子方明瑜(胡定欣)的信心，继而帮助卓彧对付金融界女强人柴沛勋(江美仪)，资雅几乎左右大局，卓彧的雄心壮志似被吞噬，充满杀戮的金融战场上，胜负最后谁来定夺……

programme.title: Samudra Cinta
programme.desc: The love story between Ocean and Cinta, which had always quarreled before. Gradually, they became friends and slowly grew in love between them. But a secret between the Cinta family and the Samudra family makes their relationship complicated because there is a big secret about Cinta that can ruin their relationship.

programme.title: CINTA 2 PILIHAN
programme.desc: Fathir and Sukma are a married couple who live a simple but happy life. Until finally, their beloved daughter Zahra is diagnosed with a serious illness in the midst of their family's financial difficulties. At the same time, Fathir accidentally meets his ex-girlfriend Clara.

programme.title: ORDER AYAM DAPET JODOH
programme.desc: Reta (Angelica Simperler) is a beautiful but incredibly spoiled woman. After hitting Dion (Qausar Harta Yudana) with her car, she arrogantly offers him money instead of an apology. Disgusted by her behavior, Reta’s mother forces her to live and work with Dion for two months to learn humility and change her ways.

programme.title: DEWI RINDU
programme.desc: Dewi is a girl with big dreams. She is determined to become successful and lift her family out of economic hardship. But who would have thought that her beautiful dream would be shattered and she would have to face the bitter reality of being pregnant out of wedlock.

programme.title: Habis Gelap Terbitlah Jalan Ke Hatimu
programme.desc: Siska (Aisyah Aqilah) spends her days managing a corn plantation and selling various corn-based treats. Her peaceful life is disrupted when she nearly crashes her truck into Rangga (Junior Roberts), a handsome man who, unbeknownst to her, has been arranged to be her husband by her grandfather. Rangga’s true motive? To marry Siska only so he can sell off her beloved plantation.

programme.title: Samudra Cinta
programme.desc: The love story between Ocean and Cinta, which had always quarreled before. Gradually, they became friends and slowly grew in love between them. But a secret between the Cinta family and the Samudra family makes their relationship complicated because there is a big secret about Cinta that can ruin their relationship.

programme.title: CINTA 2 PILIHAN
programme.desc: Fathir and Sukma are a married couple who live a simple but happy life. Until finally, their beloved daughter Zahra is diagnosed with a serious illness in the midst of their family's financial difficulties. At the same time, Fathir accidentally meets his ex-girlfriend Clara.

programme.title: SI MANIS PENJAGA HATI YANG TAK INGKAR JANJI
programme.desc: After losing her security job and having her motorcycle taken by Leo (Junior Liem), Aya (Yunita Siregar) chases him down, thinking he’s a thief. Leo is a spoiled rich man who hates being followed by guards. When his frustrated bodyguards quit, Leo's father, Mr. Herman, desperately looks for a replacement. Despite his initial doubts, Mr. Herman hires Aya after seeing her impressive pencak silat skills making her the new protector for the man she tried to punch.

programme.title: DEWI RINDU
programme.desc: Dewi is a girl with big dreams. She is determined to become successful and lift her family out of economic hardship. But who would have thought that her beautiful dream would be shattered and she would have to face the bitter reality of being pregnant out of wedlock.

programme.title: Mau Bikin Romantis Ternyata Bikin Nangis
programme.desc: Deva (Ika Diharjo) balances two lives: she’s a pencak silat instructor and a cleaning service worker at Rizki’s (Mahdy Reza) college. Rizki, who is nursing a broken heart after being cheated on, desperately needs a distraction. He asks Deva to pose as his new girlfriend to impress his mother, leading to a fake relationship filled with kicks and complications.

programme.title: Samudra Cinta
programme.desc: The love story between Ocean and Cinta, which had always quarreled before. Gradually, they became friends and slowly grew in love between them. But a secret between the Cinta family and the Samudra family makes their relationship complicated because there is a big secret about Cinta that can ruin their relationship.

programme.title: CINTA GUE ANTI UTANG
programme.desc: Tommy (Hardi Fadhillah) hates his job: collecting debts for his father. His latest assignment is Bu Anisa, who hasn't paid her twenty-five million rupiah debt in five years. Tommy is ready to be firm until he meets Ratih (Naomi Zaskia), Bu Anisa's daughter. Ratih touches Tommy’s heart when she promises to pay off the debt using her meager salary as a village school teacher.

programme.title: CINTA 2 PILIHAN
programme.desc: Fathir and Sukma are a married couple who live a simple but happy life. Until finally, their beloved daughter Zahra is diagnosed with a serious illness in the midst of their family's financial difficulties. At the same time, Fathir accidentally meets his ex-girlfriend Clara.

programme.title: MINTA HATI DAPAT JANTUNG MINTA PEMBANTU DAPAT JODOH
programme.desc: Ajeng (Bunga Zainal) arrives in Jakarta and is picked up by Marvin (Fero Walandouw), the grandson of Oma Mina (Dini Vitri), her new employer who has just returned from abroad. Oma Mina lives with Toni (Fendy Chow), Marvin’s older brother. Ajeng works as a housemaid, taking care of Oma Mina, from feeding her to preparing her medicine. Marvin and Toni are surprised at how close Ajeng becomes with Oma Mina, as many previous maids quit because Oma Mina was strict and temperamental.

programme.title: DEWI RINDU
programme.desc: Dewi is a girl with big dreams. She is determined to become successful and lift her family out of economic hardship. But who would have thought that her beautiful dream would be shattered and she would have to face the bitter reality of being pregnant out of wedlock.

programme.title: Cinta Kita Ngeri Ngeri Sedap
programme.desc: Sasi (Larasati Nugroho) is a martial arts expert and a gifted athlete, yet she constantly suffers from bad luck-mostly caused by Juna (Hardi Fadhillah). However, as Sasi faces a string of heartbreaks and betrayals from her boyfriends, she realizes that Juna is the only one who has ever truly stayed by her side through thick and thin.

Her peaceful life is disrupted when she nearly crashes her truck into Rangga (Junior Roberts), a handsome man who, unbeknownst to her, has been arranged to be her husband by her grandfather. Rangga’s true motive? To marry Siska only so he can sell off her beloved plantation.

programme.title: Samudra Cinta
programme.desc: The love story between Ocean and Cinta, which had always quarreled before. Gradually, they became friends and slowly grew in love between them. But a secret between the Cinta family and the Samudra family makes their relationship complicated because there is a big secret about Cinta that can ruin their relationship.

programme.title: SI MANIS PENJAGA HATI YANG TAK INGKAR JANJI
programme.desc: After losing her security job and having her motorcycle taken by Leo (Junior Liem), Aya (Yunita Siregar) chases him down, thinking he’s a thief. Leo is a spoiled rich man who hates being followed by guards. When his frustrated bodyguards quit, Leo's father, Mr. Herman, desperately looks for a replacement. Despite his initial doubts, Mr. Herman hires Aya after seeing her impressive pencak silat skills making her the new protector for the man she tried to punch.

programme.title: CINTA 2 PILIHAN
programme.desc: Fathir and Sukma are a married couple who live a simple but happy life. Until finally, their beloved daughter Zahra is diagnosed with a serious illness in the midst of their family's financial difficulties. At the same time, Fathir accidentally meets his ex-girlfriend Clara.

programme.title: Habis Gelap Terbitlah Yang Menyala
programme.desc: Indri (Shanice Margaretha) is a hardworking independent woman who sells traditional herbal medicine (jamu) on her old bicycle. One day, she accidentally crashes into Pras (Cakrawala Airawan), an executive rushing to an important meeting. Their paths cross again when a frustrated Indri finds Pras outside her house, unintentionally making a mess of her laundry.

programme.title: DEWI RINDU
programme.desc: Dewi is a girl with big dreams. She is determined to become successful and lift her family out of economic hardship. But who would have thought that her beautiful dream would be shattered and she would have to face the bitter reality of being pregnant out of wedlock.

programme.title: Jodoh Itu, Ketuk Pintu Dulu! Jangan Main Bablas
programme.desc: While Cila’s (Ersya Aurelia) crispy fish skin (basreng) business is booming, her love life is a disaster-especially after being betrayed by her best friend. She meets Eril (Cakrawala Airawan), whose mother disapproves of his current girlfriend. Cila and Eril decide to form a business partnership with Eril as her fish supplier, united by their shared success and a common enemy named Roy.

programme.title: Samudra Cinta
programme.desc: The love story between Ocean and Cinta, which had always quarreled before. Gradually, they became friends and slowly grew in love between them. But a secret between the Cinta family and the Samudra family makes their relationship complicated because there is a big secret about Cinta that can ruin their relationship.

programme.title: Netbusters 2025/26
programme.desc: Relive the best action from the Premier League with this fast-paced ISO angle highlights show, featuring every game and every goal from each matchround.

programme.title: PL Preview 2025/26
programme.desc: We preview Manchester City’s blockbuster title clash with Arsenal, Liverpool’s trip to Everton for the Merseyside derby, and Chelsea hosting Manchester United.

programme.title: Premier League 2025/26
programme.desc: Manchester United are unbeaten in their last 18 home league games against Leeds (W11 D7) since a 1-0 loss in February 1981 under Dave Sexton.

programme.title: The Big Interview 2025/26
programme.desc: Antoine Semenyo's journey to the Premier League has been anything but straightforward. Starting his career at Bristol City, he had loan spells at Bath City, Newport County and Sunderland. Then, in 2023, the Ghanaian winger moved to Bournemouth and has never looked back. With 30 goals in four seasons on the South Coast, Semenyo established himself as one of the brightest talents in the Premier League and, this season, made the move to Manchester City.

programme.title: PL Rewind 2025/26
programme.desc: Ray Parlour spent 15 years with the Gunners, winning three Premier League titles during that time. His third was perhaps the most memorable of them all. The "Romford Pele" looks back at the 2003/04 campaign, the season of the Invincibles.

programme.title: PL Stories 2025/26
programme.desc: We step inside the world of Tijjani Reijnders, joining him at home with his family in Manchester as he reflects on his remarkable rise to the top of the game. From his early beginnings to the bright lights of Manchester City, Reijnders opens up about the pivotal moments that shaped his career, the challenges he’s overcome, and the ambitions that continue to drive him.

programme.title: Fantasy Show 2025/26
programme.desc: Haaland or Salah? Saka or Palmer? Isak or Cunha? Picking your Fantasy team is never easy, but the Fantasy Show is on hand to help FPL Managers with those big decisions.

programme.desc: The life of a simple flower farm girl is shattered when she falls for a charming accountant, who turns out to be a married gun cartel member. Targeted for his stolen money, she loses everything she holds dear and reinvents herself to seek justice.

programme.title: 守诚者
programme.desc: [附中英文字幕] 金融核弹重启全港危 周雄和安娜密谋时，通过琼斯的照片发现了金融核弹的代码可能藏在佛牌里。周雄回忆起，在兰崖军团时，希瓦曾经告诉他，这个佛牌替琼斯挡了刀。然后，周雄还想起在合力货柜场接货时，希瓦在临死前把佛牌给了那个南亚裔警察。

programme.title: 逍遥
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】讲述了生性洒脱的少女肖瑶（谭松韵饰）误入万妖谷引发风波，与万妖之王红烨（侯明昊饰）共同卷入神秘怪案。

programme.title: 爱．回家之开心速递
programme.desc: 故事主要围绕“熊氏一家”在家中的生活点滴和工作上的繁忙。

programme.title: 星河长明
programme.desc: 阿夙得知大晁要屠杀夜北人，告知七海伶，二人尽力保护族人。同时，叶凌霜进入钦天监，改名白露，被彧修明要求在十天内算出星瀚大典的吉址。白露听到樊如晦和界海天的对话后，利用自己的聪明才智在彧修明和界海天之间周旋。她从云纹处得知芳华镜在苦渊海，因担忧七海蕊而偷偷出宫。

programme.title: 多情城市
programme.desc: 以1960至1970年代九份为背景，述说三个拜把兄弟如何赤手空拳打天下，藉由上一代的爱情故事串连两代之间共同的情感与记忆，深度探索两代之间的价值观差异。

programme.title: 善良的女人夫世彌
programme.desc: [附中英文字幕]一个保镖为了避开老板的敌人，藏身在乡村当幼儿园老师却意外遇上了新的挑战：一个心存怀疑的草莓农夫！

programme.title: 山河枕
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】大将军之女楚瑜（宋茜饰）因家族蒙冤，以卫家长嫂身份与卫家幼子卫韫（丁禹兮饰）共同追查七万将士战死真相，二人在抵御北狄入侵、揭露皇室阴谋的过程中渐生情愫，同时守护家国安宁。

programme.title: 爱．回家之开心速递
programme.desc: 故事主要围绕“熊氏一家”在家中的生活点滴和工作上的繁忙。

programme.desc: 以1960至1970年代九份为背景，述说三个拜把兄弟如何赤手空拳打天下，藉由上一代的爱情故事串连两代之间共同的情感与记忆，深度探索两代之间的价值观差异。

programme.title: 守诚者
programme.desc: [附中英文字幕] 金融核弹重启全港危 周雄和安娜密谋时，通过琼斯的照片发现了金融核弹的代码可能藏在佛牌里。周雄回忆起，在兰崖军团时，希瓦曾经告诉他，这个佛牌替琼斯挡了刀。然后，周雄还想起在合力货柜场接货时，希瓦在临死前把佛牌给了那个南亚裔警察。

programme.title: 逍遥
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】讲述了生性洒脱的少女肖瑶（谭松韵饰）误入万妖谷引发风波，与万妖之王红烨（侯明昊饰）共同卷入神秘怪案。

programme.title: 爱．回家之开心速递
programme.desc: 故事主要围绕“熊氏一家”在家中的生活点滴和工作上的繁忙。

programme.title: 星河长明
programme.desc: 阿夙得知大晁要屠杀夜北人，告知七海伶，二人尽力保护族人。同时，叶凌霜进入钦天监，改名白露，被彧修明要求在十天内算出星瀚大典的吉址。白露听到樊如晦和界海天的对话后，利用自己的聪明才智在彧修明和界海天之间周旋。她从云纹处得知芳华镜在苦渊海，因担忧七海蕊而偷偷出宫。

programme.title: 多情城市
programme.desc: 以1960至1970年代九份为背景，述说三个拜把兄弟如何赤手空拳打天下，藉由上一代的爱情故事串连两代之间共同的情感与记忆，深度探索两代之间的价值观差异。

programme.title: 台风的新娘
programme.desc: 虽然殷瑞妍并不富有，但大家都知道她有一颗温暖的心。 有一天，她发现自己一直称为父亲的姜白山，居然是自己亲生父母的仇敌。 殷瑞妍的复仇行动渐渐开始展开……

programme.title: 台风的新娘
programme.desc: 虽然殷瑞妍并不富有，但大家都知道她有一颗温暖的心。 有一天，她发现自己一直称为父亲的姜白山，居然是自己亲生父母的仇敌。 殷瑞妍的复仇行动渐渐开始展开……

programme.title: 山河枕
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】大将军之女楚瑜（宋茜饰）因家族蒙冤，以卫家长嫂身份与卫家幼子卫韫（丁禹兮饰）共同追查七万将士战死真相，二人在抵御北狄入侵、揭露皇室阴谋的过程中渐生情愫，同时守护家国安宁。

programme.title: 巾帼枭雄之悬崖
programme.desc: 医院一方要求桂婵决定可要接受第二次手术，做的话有一半机会死去，不做的话会有终身腰痛、记忆慢慢衰退等后遗症，桂婵迟迟下不了决定。十七和韦豪等人在牢房中发现一条未挖完的隧道，决定逃狱。桂婵调查到薇姨的父亲之死疑与四海有关，劝她尽快迷途知返，薇姨看似无动于衷。桂婵最终决定做手术，而十七亦挖好隧道；面对九死一生的未来，两人约定无论谁不幸离世，均会在天上等着对方。

programme.title: 多情城市
programme.desc: 以1960至1970年代九份为背景，述说三个拜把兄弟如何赤手空拳打天下，藉由上一代的爱情故事串连两代之间共同的情感与记忆，深度探索两代之间的价值观差异。

programme.title: 守诚者
programme.desc: [附中英文字幕] 全港警民全力守城 何浩辉带警员去找周雄，路上给邵峰打电话汇报情况。全球金融峰会现场的刘先生得知炸弹之事，告诉阮sir港府绝无可能向周雄妥协，阮sir表示已经安排警力，守备在会场的部分警力也调动过去，刘先生指示一定要在股市开市前拆除炸弹。

programme.title: 星河长明
programme.desc: 叶景清临终前将保护白露的使命交给了翼无忧，希望他前往天启守护白露。白露在天启努力寻找合适的吉址，最终选定了一个既不劳民又不伤财的位置，并得到了彧修明的认可。然而，这一举动引起了界海天和樊如晦的不满。另一方面，七海伶为了拯救夜北族民，心生杀彧修明的想法，并暗中联合他人计划行动。

programme.title: 善良的女人夫世彌
programme.desc: [附中英文字幕]一个保镖为了避开老板的敌人，藏身在乡村当幼儿园老师却意外遇上了新的挑战：一个心存怀疑的草莓农夫！

programme.title: 微雨燕双飞
programme.desc: 荆国安平初年少年皇帝即位，战事纷涌，民不聊生。六品官员白文泰的侄女茉喜（张楠饰）与掌上明珠凤瑶（王玉雯饰）意外被卷进了是非之中。

programme.title: 一念关山
programme.desc: 讲述安国朱衣卫前左使任如意（刘诗诗饰）因机缘巧合成为梧国迎帝使小分队成员，和梧国六道堂堂主宁远舟（刘宇宁饰）等人经历生死，共同成长的故事。

programme.title: 一念关山
programme.desc: 讲述安国朱衣卫前左使任如意（刘诗诗饰）因机缘巧合成为梧国迎帝使小分队成员，和梧国六道堂堂主宁远舟（刘宇宁饰）等人经历生死，共同成长的故事。

programme.title: 守诚者
programme.desc: [附中英文字幕] 暴徒打砸谢庭威中枪 救驾有功的谢庭威获得了巴朗的信任，何浩辉跟邵峰分析现在叫谢庭威归队有点可惜，会看紧庭威。何浩辉代替谢庭威到学校演讲，何乐轩十分骄傲。 关颖在棠哥家仍然和混混联系，凭借红姐对自己的喜爱管红姐要钱花。

programme.title: 守诚者
programme.desc: [附中英文字幕] 巴朗抓内鬼庭威传信 谢庭威打出电话，是雄记茶餐厅，证明了庭威的清白，何浩辉决定第二天无论如何都要收网。手机被没收的谢庭威为了尽快将消息传递出去，主动要求试试希罗达，在仪式后发起了高烧。

programme.title: 守诚者
programme.desc: [附中英文字幕] 警匪激战周雄再逃脱 民生货柜场内，伊亚和八皮开始交易。何浩辉突然叫停行动，只让密切跟踪这两拨人。原来谢庭威通过设计好的暗号，将交易有诈的信息传递给何浩辉。周雄告诉八皮，演出开始了。伊亚将车开进合力货柜场，一众警员跟踪车辆驶往合力货柜场。

programme.title: 守诚者
programme.desc: [附中英文字幕] 金融核弹重启全港危 周雄和安娜密谋时，通过琼斯的照片发现了金融核弹的代码可能藏在佛牌里。周雄回忆起，在兰崖军团时，希瓦曾经告诉他，这个佛牌替琼斯挡了刀。然后，周雄还想起在合力货柜场接货时，希瓦在临死前把佛牌给了那个南亚裔警察。

programme.title: 守诚者
programme.desc: [附中英文字幕] 全港警民全力守城 何浩辉带警员去找周雄，路上给邵峰打电话汇报情况。全球金融峰会现场的刘先生得知炸弹之事，告诉阮sir港府绝无可能向周雄妥协，阮sir表示已经安排警力，守备在会场的部分警力也调动过去，刘先生指示一定要在股市开市前拆除炸弹。

programme.title: 偶像疯子
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】讲述了资深铁杆粉丝出身的明星律师孟世娜（崔秀英饰），为了被诬陷为杀人嫌疑人的偶像都来益（金宰永饰）进行辩护，并由此展开的一系列故事。

programme.title: 陪玩的女人
programme.desc: 剧情讲述清洗了黑暗过去的大哥至焕（严泰九饰）和陪孩子们玩的米妮姐姐（韩善伙饰）银河之间满是反转和心动的爱情故事。

programme.title: 亲爱的仇敌
programme.desc: [附中英文字幕] 第十八集 这不是心动吧 “美少女壮士“群里资讯不断，见不了面，大家经常开视频聊天：陈氏夫妇感情回温，就是陈勉天天想吃包子，陈凯西做得快吐了；钟倾城跑步看片，积极充电；罗曼忙着转发求助和辟谣，团购物资支援各地，只有偶尔和方驰的聊天，会让她跳出焦虑。局势稳定父母回家，临行前打听方驰情况，罗曼大惊：丧心病狂了吧！方驰才多大！不想父母是打算介绍给她表妹。

programme.title: 亲爱的仇敌
programme.desc: [附中英文字幕] 第十九集 斯人如彩虹 罗曼要搞定的帅哥医生就是方驰。没想到方驰以专心学习拒绝。方驰去露营，罗曼制造偶遇。方驰当做是约会，搭帐篷、生火做饭，上手就是三串一饼，罗曼将话题转到人生目标，试图用参加节目能提高自己的竞争力，与同门刘怡然竞争唯一留院名额，方驰反问她，妳的人生只有第一这个选项？罗曼从小被培养成夺冠赛犬，所有人只看她飞得多高，第一个关心她飞得累不累的，竟然是她以为的小孩，方驰。

programme.title: 一念关山
programme.desc: 讲述安国朱衣卫前左使任如意（刘诗诗饰）因机缘巧合成为梧国迎帝使小分队成员，和梧国六道堂堂主宁远舟（刘宇宁饰）等人经历生死，共同成长的故事。

programme.title: 一念关山
programme.desc: 讲述安国朱衣卫前左使任如意（刘诗诗饰）因机缘巧合成为梧国迎帝使小分队成员，和梧国六道堂堂主宁远舟（刘宇宁饰）等人经历生死，共同成长的故事。

programme.title: 亲爱的仇敌
programme.desc: [附中英文字幕] 第二十集 我得知道，我在一个什么样的地狱里 罗曼被派去急诊室要一份拍摄许可，抬头见到周慕孙。他打羽毛球扭到腰。两人四目，周慕孙还想叙旧，罗曼拉着路过方驰救场。方驰熟练询问病情，在周慕孙的腰上触诊便开了药。周慕孙行动不便，罗曼本着善意帮他交费拿药，还送他上车，无视方驰。直到方驰赌气不跟罗曼吃夜宵。罗曼觉着他和方驰的关系变化了，在KTV拍摄，节目组安排方驰和刘怡然抄CP，罗曼越看越不是滋味。

programme.title: 亲爱的仇敌
programme.desc: [附中英文字幕] 第二十一集 选北京的一套房，还是一个人 家里老人寄错地址，一双给新生儿的虎头鞋，让陈凯西第一次情绪失控，说出离婚。陈勉把责任推到前助理身上，保证处理好一切。接着不惜血本，陈凯西老家拆迁，亲戚跟陈父争房，陈勉就给送了一套，赢得岳父岳母称赞。稳住后方，陈勉心情大好约了羽毛球局，却发现方驰对周慕孙有敌意，周慕孙点出小孩跟罗曼动了情。

programme.title: 偶像疯子
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】讲述了资深铁杆粉丝出身的明星律师孟世娜（崔秀英饰），为了被诬陷为杀人嫌疑人的偶像都来益（金宰永饰）进行辩护，并由此展开的一系列故事。

programme.title: 陪玩的女人
programme.desc: 剧情讲述清洗了黑暗过去的大哥至焕（严泰九饰）和陪孩子们玩的米妮姐姐（韩善伙饰）银河之间满是反转和心动的爱情故事。

programme.title: iKiss
programme.desc: Sam overhears Freddie confess to Carly that he's never kissed a girl, then exposes his secret on the webshow. Gibby and Carly train Spencer for a tryout with the local professional football team.

programme.title: Robarazzi
programme.desc: Tori suggests Robbie capture videos of students' everyday lives to increase his blog traffic, but when the camera is turned on Tori, she asks him to stop. Only Robbie doesn't and Tori realizes she's created a monster.

programme.title: #MotorcycleMystery
programme.desc: Sam, Dice and Goomer go to an MMA fight and leave Cat home to study. Upon returning, they discover that Sam's motorcycle is missing and Cat can't remember the day. The group sets out to solve the mystery and get Sam's bike back.

programme.title: Raph Fights Everyone
programme.desc: With all his family and friends under Kitsune's mind control, Raph no longer wants to fight in the Mutant Battle Arena. But he'll have to (with Pigeon Pete's help) in order to save EVERYONE he loves before it's too late!

programme.title: The Island
programme.desc: The Mutanimals turn on the Ninja Turtles after Ray Fillet accuses them of attacking him in Central Park! The Turtles realize a mutant snapping turtle named Tokka is on the loose, drawing Donnie to a terrifying laboratory on Staten Island!

programme.title: Sandy's Nutty Nieces / Insecurity Guards
programme.desc: SpongeBob gets in over his head when he volunteers to babysit Sandy's 3 nieces. // SpongeBob and Patrick volunteer as guards at the museum, while Squidward attempts to hang his painting unnoticed.

programme.title: Broken Alarm / Karen's Baby
programme.desc: SpongeBob breaks his precious alarm clock, but nothing else is loud enough to wake him up on time. // Karen quickly learns that kids grow up too fast after her new child arrives in the mail.

programme.title: Houbi Houba Heist / Twister's Treehouse
programme.desc: Mica's Marsup journal ends up in Acu's bag so he has to get it back before his friend finds it. // Twister, is fed up of Hope and Punch's pranks, so he builds his own cardboard house which Stan finds.

programme.title: Bad Eggs / Out of Bounds
programme.desc: Best ruins Bester's painting by accident so in order to avoid hurting her feelings he blames an innocent chicken. // Having lost their soccer ball over the garden fence, the twins have no option but to find a way to get it back.

programme.title: Robo Stomp / Wood You?
programme.desc: Bester's record attempt is at risk when Best steals her thunder by being the robot instead of learning the robot. // On a search for the first woodpecker in spring, Best finds that he's in very much in tune with nature after all.

programme.title: Stair Wars / Enemies a la Mode
programme.desc: Patrick and GrandPat try to pass each other on the stairs, leading to a ludicrous conflict. // The members of the Star family each confront their own absurd rivalries.

programme.title: Lost in Couch / Pat-a-thon
programme.desc: Patrick loses the remote in the cushions, so he journeys into the couch to track it down. // Patrick hosts a telethon to raise money for snails who can't dance.

programme.title: Gary's Got Legs / King Plankton
programme.desc: Gary is given a set of limbs to keep up with SpongeBob, but soon makes his owner look sluggish by comparison. // Plankton practices ruling the world by shrinking himself down and declaring himself king of SpongeBob's aquarium.

programme.title: Snail Mail
programme.desc: SpongeBob accidentally fibs to his pen pal, but when his friend comes to visit, he must keep the ruse going!

programme.title: I Know What You Did This Summer
programme.desc: Max learns that Phoebe is working with Captain Perfect, and sets out to uncover the secret he is keeping. Chloe's crush invites her to a product launch party at Splat By The Sea, at the same time Jinx and Booch want her to protest outside the party.

programme.title: Earth To Bose
programme.desc: Strange things start to happen to Bose when he finds himself in love with an alien.

programme.title: Visible Brad
programme.desc: Captain Man and Kid Danger are going to need a little bit of magic and some help from an old friend if they want to catch a thief.

programme.title: Yes Man / Friend or Faux
programme.desc: The sisters enlist the "Master of Convincing" (AKA Lincoln) to teach them how to ask Mom and Dad for money. // Lisa gets her report card and finds she's failed 'social skills'. To bring up her grade, she must make a friend.

programme.title: No Laughing Matter / No Spoilers
programme.desc: When Luan overhears her siblings complaining about her comedy, she decides to give it up. // Knowing Leni's history of spoiling surprises, the kids don't tell her about Mom's upcoming party.

programme.title: Music to My Fears
programme.desc: Luna and the Moon Goats have to find a replacement guitarist for the band when Luna injures her hands from playing.

programme.title: Abandon Twits / Wallhalla
programme.desc: The Krusty Krew builds a boat for their penny-pinching captain. // SpongeBob discovers a crazed castaway living in his walls.

programme.title: The Salty Sponge / Karen for Spot
programme.desc: SpongeBob works the grill at the toughest joint in town. // Karen looks after Spot while Plankton goes out of town.

programme.title: The Dirty Bubble Bass
programme.desc: Bubble Bass and the Dirty Bubble team up to become Bikini Bottom's nastiest nefarious nuisance.

programme.title: Jade the Influencer / Restaurant Review
programme.desc: Bibi goes live, but when she's not getting enough likes Twister steps in to help, and is almost unmasked. // Gran Gran's convinced the Chahuta and won't impress a food critic, so tries to change things.

programme.title: Chum Bucket List / Big Baby Patrick
programme.desc: After Patrick eats life-threatening chum, SpongeBob helps him check off his bucket list. // Patrick devolves back into a baby so he can keep his childhood toys.

programme.title: The Patrick Show After Dark
programme.desc: Patrick and Squidina explore Bikini Bottom late at night.

programme.title: Intern for the Worse / The Old and the Restless
programme.desc: Tensions run high when Lincoln and Clyde both get an internship at Flip's and compete to win the manager title. // When Lincoln sees how tame Pop Pop has gotten in his older age, he takes him out for a day to remember.

programme.title: Bye Tanya / What Lies Beneath
programme.desc: Leni must protect her mannequin friend Tanya when her boss, Ms. Carmichael, decides to update Reininger's. // When Dante buries a secret in The Royal Woods Cemetery, he must stop the Morticians Club from discovering what it is.

programme.title: Suite and Sour / Back in Black
programme.desc: After Mom and Dad win a trip to a resort, they decide to take the kids - but only because they promised to behave. // When Lucy gets a crush on a 'regular and normal' boy, her sisters give her a makeover.

programme.title: Making the Grade / Vantastic Voyage
programme.desc: When Lincoln's four-year-old sister, Lisa, gets put into his 5th grade class, his social standing is at stake! // Sick of their family van always falling apart, the kids decide to try and trick Dad into buying a cool new van.

programme.title: The Library
programme.desc: Lily must retrieve a book from the dreaded library: a horrifying maze of unknown terrors. Can she and Jack escape alive?

programme.title: Canyon Valley Film Festival
programme.desc: Canyon Valley hosts a festival and Jack's excited to enter, until the pressure to deliver a masterpiece gets to him.

programme.title: Summer Chuseok
programme.desc: In an attempt to get out of the dentist, Lily insists on a summer celebration of the fall holiday Chuseok.

programme.title: Mall Girl Pearl / Two Thumbs Down
programme.desc: Pearl gets a job to be cool like her friends, but the only store that's hiring is the lamest store at the mall! // SpongeBob loses the use of his thumbs, and must get them back in working order before his entire life falls apart.

programme.title: Stormy Weather
programme.desc: SpongeBob befriends a small storm cloud, but has to protect it from a crazed weather man.

programme.title: Dance Off / The show must go on
programme.desc: Jade's a great dancer which results in her facing Mr Best for dance off in person. // Mica and Jade put on a play to win their school a prize, but forget a key prop so the Marsups step in to help.

programme.title: Fandom Pains / Rita Her Rights
programme.desc: Lucy is annoyed that Lori and Leni have started watching her vampire show because of a cute new character. // After getting community service for racking up tickets, Mom finds it's more relaxing than being at home.

programme.title: Pet Project / Cuff Break
programme.desc: When Mom and the twins win a raffle to spend a weekend at a resort, Lana struggles to leave her pets behind. // After Lincoln tests a magic trick on Grouse, they get handcuffed together and Grouse has to spend the day at middle school.

programme.title: Tea Tale Heart
programme.desc: Lola discovers Lucy has an old, fragile doll and decides she must borrow it - no matter what Lucy says.

programme.title: Date Night / Behind the Jingle
programme.desc: Will and Min's date ends up in a rideshare turf war. At home, Halmoni throws a party as the kids try to prove they can watch themselves. // The family gets famous after their Groom & Board Jingle hits #1. But fame is fickle and tears them apart.

programme.title: Prank U Next
programme.desc: Max seeks help dealing with a mystery prankster at school from his old principal, who was always the target of his pranks. But Max fails to stop the pranks and quits the mission, prompting Chloe to confess that she was the prankster all along.

programme.title: Dodging Danger
programme.desc: When Henry uses his new super power to compete in a Dodge-A-Leen tournament, Ray, Schwoz, and Charlotte go undercover to teach Henry a lesson.

programme.title: iTake on Dingo
programme.desc: The Dingo channel has apparently been stealing ideas from iCarly, so Carly, Sam, Freddie, and Spencer go to the Dingo studio to give the writers a piece of their mind.

programme.title: Cat's New Boyfriend
programme.desc: When Tori finds out that Cat is dating her ex-boyfriend, her jealousy threatens to ruin their relationship. Meanwhile, Trina uses fish to make everyone's feet super smooth but at what cost?

programme.title: How Zelda Got Her Groove Back Back
programme.desc: Sadie and Lay Lay are determined to find Principal Willingham a date so she'll approve a school dance, but disagree on who her date should be. Separately, they set out on their own match-making missions to prove who is right.

programme.title: The Sweet Spot / A Tale of Two Tables
programme.desc: Lincoln devises a plan to get the best seat in the car for a long, family, road trip. // Lincoln tries to prove he's mature enough to have dinner at the adult table, leaving the kiddie table behind him.

programme.title: Project Loud House / In Tents Debate
programme.desc: Lincoln has to get to school on time but getting his sisters out the door proves to be the biggest obstacle of all. // Lincoln is the deciding vote on going to the beach or the amusement park for their family vacation.

programme.title: Date Night / Behind the Jingle
programme.desc: Will and Min's date ends up in a rideshare turf war. At home, Halmoni throws a party as the kids try to prove they can watch themselves. // The family gets famous after their Groom & Board Jingle hits #1. But fame is fickle and tears them apart.

programme.title: We Heart Hoops / SpongeChovy
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick discover that their favorite Kelpbed Kid is a familiar face. // It's invasion of the faux-chovies when everyone in Bikini Bottom suddenly starts meeping!

programme.title: Time to Eat / Cleanin' House
programme.desc: Patrick hosts a time-travelling food show. // While Bunny's in Klopnod, the Star home becomes a mess.

programme.title: Lost in Couch
programme.desc: Patrick loses the remote in the cushions, so he journeys into the couch to track it down.

programme.title: Present Danger / Stressed for the Part
programme.desc: Dressed as David Steele, Lincoln is on the hunt for his stolen birthday present before it's destroyed. // After landing a role in a Dairyland production, Luan must hide this news from Mrs. Bernardo, who she beat out.

programme.title: Study Muffin / Homespun
programme.desc: Lincoln gets a tutor that all his sisters instantly get crushes on, making it impossible for Lincoln to study. // The kids complain about their house, but when a tornado threatens to destroy it, they start to feel differently.

programme.title: Date Night / Behind the Jingle
programme.desc: Will and Min's date ends up in a rideshare turf war. At home, Halmoni throws a party as the kids try to prove they can watch themselves. // The family gets famous after their Groom & Board Jingle hits #1. But fame is fickle and tears them apart.

programme.title: Just a Little Pipe Problem / Camp Chuck
programme.desc: The Groom & Board gets a surprise inspection, but the broken pipe Jack and Lil neglected to fix might ruin them all. // Chuck's got a new hustle: theatre camp! Jack & Lil are sure it's a scam. But there's more to the chaotic show than they realized.

programme.title: Lost in Bikini Bottom / Tutor Sauce
programme.desc: SpongeBob tries to take a shortcut to work, but becomes lost along the way. // After failing his driver's test again, Mr. Krabs decides to teach SpongeBob how to drive himself.

programme.title: Dance Off / The show must go on
programme.desc: Jade's a great dancer which results in her facing Mr Best for dance off in person. // Mica and Jade put on a play to win their school a prize, but forget a key prop so the Marsups step in to help.

programme.title: 守诚者
programme.desc: [附中英文字幕] 金融核弹重启全港危 周雄和安娜密谋时，通过琼斯的照片发现了金融核弹的代码可能藏在佛牌里。周雄回忆起，在兰崖军团时，希瓦曾经告诉他，这个佛牌替琼斯挡了刀。然后，周雄还想起在合力货柜场接货时，希瓦在临死前把佛牌给了那个南亚裔警察。

programme.title: 逍遥
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】讲述了生性洒脱的少女肖瑶（谭松韵饰）误入万妖谷引发风波，与万妖之王红烨（侯明昊饰）共同卷入神秘怪案。

programme.title: 爱．回家之开心速递
programme.desc: 故事主要围绕“熊氏一家”在家中的生活点滴和工作上的繁忙。

programme.title: 星河长明
programme.desc: 阿夙得知大晁要屠杀夜北人，告知七海伶，二人尽力保护族人。同时，叶凌霜进入钦天监，改名白露，被彧修明要求在十天内算出星瀚大典的吉址。白露听到樊如晦和界海天的对话后，利用自己的聪明才智在彧修明和界海天之间周旋。她从云纹处得知芳华镜在苦渊海，因担忧七海蕊而偷偷出宫。

programme.title: 多情城市
programme.desc: 以1960至1970年代九份为背景，述说三个拜把兄弟如何赤手空拳打天下，藉由上一代的爱情故事串连两代之间共同的情感与记忆，深度探索两代之间的价值观差异。

programme.title: 善良的女人夫世彌
programme.desc: [附中英文字幕]一个保镖为了避开老板的敌人，藏身在乡村当幼儿园老师却意外遇上了新的挑战：一个心存怀疑的草莓农夫！

programme.title: 山河枕
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】大将军之女楚瑜（宋茜饰）因家族蒙冤，以卫家长嫂身份与卫家幼子卫韫（丁禹兮饰）共同追查七万将士战死真相，二人在抵御北狄入侵、揭露皇室阴谋的过程中渐生情愫，同时守护家国安宁。

programme.title: 爱．回家之开心速递
programme.desc: 故事主要围绕“熊氏一家”在家中的生活点滴和工作上的繁忙。

programme.title: 多情城市

programme.title: 守诚者

programme.title: 爱．回家之开心速递

programme.title: 星河长明
programme.desc: 阿夙得知大晁要屠杀夜北人，告知七海伶，二人尽力保护族人。同时，叶凌霜进入钦天监，改名白露，被彧修明要求在十天内算出星瀚大典的吉址。白露听到樊如晦和界海天的对话后，利用自己的聪明才智在彧修明和界海天之间周旋。她从云纹处得知芳华镜在苦渊海，因担忧七海蕊而偷偷出宫。

programme.title: 台风的新娘
programme.desc: 虽然殷瑞妍并不富有，但大家都知道她有一颗温暖的心。 有一天，她发现自己一直称为父亲的姜白山，居然是自己亲生父母的仇敌。 殷瑞妍的复仇行动渐渐开始展开……

programme.title: 巾帼枭雄之悬崖
programme.desc: 医院一方要求桂婵决定可要接受第二次手术，做的话有一半机会死去，不做的话会有终身腰痛、记忆慢慢衰退等后遗症，桂婵迟迟下不了决定。十七和韦豪等人在牢房中发现一条未挖完的隧道，决定逃狱。桂婵调查到薇姨的父亲之死疑与四海有关，劝她尽快迷途知返，薇姨看似无动于衷。桂婵最终决定做手术，而十七亦挖好隧道；面对九死一生的未来，两人约定无论谁不幸离世，均会在天上等着对方。

programme.title: 守诚者
programme.desc: [附中英文字幕] 全港警民全力守城 何浩辉带警员去找周雄，路上给邵峰打电话汇报情况。全球金融峰会现场的刘先生得知炸弹之事，告诉阮sir港府绝无可能向周雄妥协，阮sir表示已经安排警力，守备在会场的部分警力也调动过去，刘先生指示一定要在股市开市前拆除炸弹。

programme.title: 星河长明
programme.desc: 叶景清临终前将保护白露的使命交给了翼无忧，希望他前往天启守护白露。白露在天启努力寻找合适的吉址，最终选定了一个既不劳民又不伤财的位置，并得到了彧修明的认可。然而，这一举动引起了界海天和樊如晦的不满。另一方面，七海伶为了拯救夜北族民，心生杀彧修明的想法，并暗中联合他人计划行动。

programme.desc: Mangal embarks on a quest to find Lakshmi the perfect husband, showcasing the enduring strength of sisterhood, love, trials, and the power of destiny.

programme.desc: Honest tech visionary Shivaay loses faith in technology after being scammed. When he falls for digital influencer Aadhya, their opposing worlds collide, testing love, trust, and beliefs.

programme.desc: Mahadev is a man of principles, leading a strict household as the family head! But bound to fly high, his children rebel, and a generational clash ensues!

programme.desc: Seher, a young girl in Lucknow, is determined to become a doctor. Her mother, Kausar, supports her dream, while her father's plans for marriage spark conflict.

programme.title: Tuu Juliet Jatt Di

programme.title: 销魂玉
programme.desc: 王致和无意得到通灵玩意，许下三个愿望，虽然愿望灵验之极，结果落得家散人亡；风尘女孟薇被情人林坤全害死，变成水鬼复仇；艳丽女子萧云玉香消玉殒后，仍不断在人间走动，盗坟贼欲挖开萧云玉坟墓盗取陪葬珠宝，终被萧云玉追杀致死...

programme.title: 钓金龟
programme.desc: 三个歌舞女郎张萍、叶凤、林芝兰，随歌舞团去台北表演，歌舞团经纪陈彼德原与叶拍拖，但陈移情于胡闻莺。张萍出发前被男友抛弃，叶凤要从莺手上追回陈彼德的爱，林芝兰为却一心不嫁富豪誓不回。引出乌龙百出的爱情喜剧......

programme.title: 七仙女
programme.desc: 故事描述少年董永卖身传员外家，为奴以埋父骨；其孝心感动了七仙女，便幻成村姑，在六位仙姐下凡暗助下，为董缩减偿还工作日，回复自由后，二人回董故家，但愉快的凡间生活能持续多久呢？

programme.title: 火并
programme.desc: 大同府著名银号福来钱庄，内储黄金逾百万两，使各方贼寇垂涎。独脚大盗滕奇影本欲邀钱庄护院文礼贤合谋，将钱庄金银据为己有，但文严拒；滕转向白氏姐妹玉燕及玉莺着手，共襄劫金大举......

programme.title: 船
programme.desc: 故事描述一群年青人在爱情和情感相互交错下，组成多个错综复杂的多角恋情。

programme.title: 血洒天牢
programme.desc: 宋末，大元初把天下统一，元帅将宋丞相文天祥打入天牢，意图说服其归元，亦希望借机将往救文之抗元义士一网打尽。义士之一白鸭儿在拯救途上，遇着「金掌」乐何如，忙邀共同救国，但乐自认跟踪白为贪图美色，救国非少数人所能为，拒绝后旋即逸去。及后，一众义士为救文，纷纷藉故犯法，先后成功被关入天牢，白竟在天牢再遇乐...

programme.title: 梁山伯与祝英台
programme.desc: 祝英台既为女儿身，却穿男儿装上学堂，与同窗梁山伯结下生死之爱。山伯得悉真相后，前往祝家求亲，岂料英台已被许配他人，二人被迫分开。山伯伤心欲绝，一病不起。英台惊闻噩耗，哭坟跳进墓里殉情。

programme.title: 楚留香
programme.desc: 某天，侠盗楚留香欢宴好友无花和尚，神水宫的宫南燕突然来到，指称楚盗去神水宫的天一神水，且用以毒杀多人。在楚留香极力否认下，宫南燕表示他需于一个月内找出真凶，否则必将置其于死地。楚留香为证明自身清白，决意着手调查此事件...

programme.title: 乔太守乱点鸳鸯谱
programme.desc: 孙玉郎与刘慧娘，裴政与徐雅本是两对情投意合的恋人，阴差阳错间，孙玉郎男扮女装代姐拜堂，刘慧娘则代兄娶妻。他们的婚约误配，让成误会，终闹上公堂，乔太守将错就错，干脆来了一个乱点，结果正好有情人终成眷属，皆大欢喜。

programme.title: 天下第一拳
programme.desc: 故事描述，顾文宗饰的老拳师突遭百武馆馆徒袭击，幸汪萍饰的女儿及罗烈饰的弟子救驾；顾自知年迈力衰，不足为罗师，亦恐邪派夺全国锦标，遂面谕罗改投尚武馆习艺，以夺魁为期许。罗途遇王金凤饰的卖唱女遭调戏，王获救后欲以身相许，罗心中有汪遂拒王；后罗屡遭百武馆徒滋扰，更为外援日本浪人所伤...

programme.title: 我爱金龟婿
programme.desc: 三个香港美少女何莉莉、陈依龄及凌云，带着爱情梦远赴日本大阪，一心指望钓得如意郎君。岂料三人被误会是富家千金，结果惹出趣事连篇。

programme.title: 猎魔者
programme.desc: 巨富之女贺盈聘请罗力到柬埔寨，从杀手乃汶处夺回商业秘密录音带。罗与好友组织一支敢死队，直赴游击队基地，成功将录音带交到贺手上后，方发现背后原来有极大的密秘...

programme.title: Willie Pete
programme.desc: Will continues his mission to civilize by telling Nina Howard the truth; Jim is frustrated on the road.

programme.title: John Mccain: For Whom The Bell Tolls
programme.desc: Explore the life of Sen. John McCain in this illuminating profile of one of the most influential forces in modern American politics.

programme.title: Foster
programme.desc: The documentary film upends some of the most enduring myths about foster care, offering a realistic but hopeful perspective on a community that needs society’s support.

programme.title: Unintended Consequences
programme.desc: Maggie relives her shattering trip to Africa; an OWS protester is humiliated in an on-air interview with Will.

programme.title: Downton Abbey: The Grand Finale
programme.desc: It's time to say goodbye… When Mary finds herself at the center of a public scandal and the family faces financial trouble.

programme.title: Black Bag
programme.desc: An intelligence agent is suspected of betraying the nation, forcing her agent husband to choose between loyalty to his marriage or his country.

programme.title: Iron Jawed Angels
programme.desc: Hilary Swank and Anjelica Huston star in this HBO Original Movie about the women's suffragette movement in 1920s America.

programme.title: Atomic Homefront
programme.desc: Probing the devastating impact of the illegal dumping of radioactive waste in North St. Louis communities, the moms-turned-advocates fight for answers.

programme.title: The Polar Express
programme.desc: A doubting boy finds out first-hand that Santa exists when he goes aboard a magical train headed for the North Pole.

programme.title: Kill Chain: The Cyber War On America's Elections
programme.desc: A chilling look at how vulnerable the technology used in the US voting systems really is.

programme.title: Footloose
programme.desc: A city kid moves to a small town where rock 'n' roll and dancing had been banned, and his rebellious spirit shakes up the populace.

programme.title: Something's Gotta Give
programme.desc: An unlikely love triangle teaches three individuals the value of love and life.

programme.title: 守诚者
programme.desc: [附中英文字幕] 金融核弹重启全港危 周雄和安娜密谋时，通过琼斯的照片发现了金融核弹的代码可能藏在佛牌里。周雄回忆起，在兰崖军团时，希瓦曾经告诉他，这个佛牌替琼斯挡了刀。然后，周雄还想起在合力货柜场接货时，希瓦在临死前把佛牌给了那个南亚裔警察。

programme.title: 逍遥
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】讲述了生性洒脱的少女肖瑶（谭松韵饰）误入万妖谷引发风波，与万妖之王红烨（侯明昊饰）共同卷入神秘怪案。

programme.title: 爱．回家之开心速递
programme.desc: 故事主要围绕“熊氏一家”在家中的生活点滴和工作上的繁忙。

programme.title: 星河长明
programme.desc: 阿夙得知大晁要屠杀夜北人，告知七海伶，二人尽力保护族人。同时，叶凌霜进入钦天监，改名白露，被彧修明要求在十天内算出星瀚大典的吉址。白露听到樊如晦和界海天的对话后，利用自己的聪明才智在彧修明和界海天之间周旋。她从云纹处得知芳华镜在苦渊海，因担忧七海蕊而偷偷出宫。

programme.title: 多情城市
programme.desc: 以1960至1970年代九份为背景，述说三个拜把兄弟如何赤手空拳打天下，藉由上一代的爱情故事串连两代之间共同的情感与记忆，深度探索两代之间的价值观差异。

programme.title: 善良的女人夫世彌
programme.desc: [附中英文字幕]一个保镖为了避开老板的敌人，藏身在乡村当幼儿园老师却意外遇上了新的挑战：一个心存怀疑的草莓农夫！

programme.title: 山河枕
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】大将军之女楚瑜（宋茜饰）因家族蒙冤，以卫家长嫂身份与卫家幼子卫韫（丁禹兮饰）共同追查七万将士战死真相，二人在抵御北狄入侵、揭露皇室阴谋的过程中渐生情愫，同时守护家国安宁。

programme.title: 爱．回家之开心速递
programme.desc: 故事主要围绕“熊氏一家”在家中的生活点滴和工作上的繁忙。

programme.title: 多情城市
programme.desc: 以1960至1970年代九份为背景，述说三个拜把兄弟如何赤手空拳打天下，藉由上一代的爱情故事串连两代之间共同的情感与记忆，深度探索两代之间的价值观差异。
