programme.desc: 故事主要围绕“熊氏一家”在家中的生活点滴和工作上的繁忙。

programme.title: 星河长明
programme.desc: 阿夙得知大晁要屠杀夜北人，告知七海伶，二人尽力保护族人。同时，叶凌霜进入钦天监，改名白露，被彧修明要求在十天内算出星瀚大典的吉址。白露听到樊如晦和界海天的对话后，利用自己的聪明才智在彧修明和界海天之间周旋。她从云纹处得知芳华镜在苦渊海，因担忧七海蕊而偷偷出宫。

programme.title: 台风的新娘
programme.desc: 虽然殷瑞妍并不富有，但大家都知道她有一颗温暖的心。 有一天，她发现自己一直称为父亲的姜白山，居然是自己亲生父母的仇敌。 殷瑞妍的复仇行动渐渐开始展开……

programme.title: 巾帼枭雄之悬崖
programme.desc: 医院一方要求桂婵决定可要接受第二次手术，做的话有一半机会死去，不做的话会有终身腰痛、记忆慢慢衰退等后遗症，桂婵迟迟下不了决定。十七和韦豪等人在牢房中发现一条未挖完的隧道，决定逃狱。桂婵调查到薇姨的父亲之死疑与四海有关，劝她尽快迷途知返，薇姨看似无动于衷。桂婵最终决定做手术，而十七亦挖好隧道；面对九死一生的未来，两人约定无论谁不幸离世，均会在天上等着对方。

programme.title: 多情城市
programme.desc: 以1960至1970年代九份为背景，述说三个拜把兄弟如何赤手空拳打天下，藉由上一代的爱情故事串连两代之间共同的情感与记忆，深度探索两代之间的价值观差异。

programme.title: 爱．回家之开心速递
programme.desc: 故事主要围绕“熊氏一家”在家中的生活点滴和工作上的繁忙。

programme.title: 山河枕
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】大将军之女楚瑜（宋茜饰）因家族蒙冤，以卫家长嫂身份与卫家幼子卫韫（丁禹兮饰）共同追查七万将士战死真相，二人在抵御北狄入侵、揭露皇室阴谋的过程中渐生情愫，同时守护家国安宁。

programme.title: 守诚者
programme.desc: [附中英文字幕] 全港警民全力守城 何浩辉带警员去找周雄，路上给邵峰打电话汇报情况。全球金融峰会现场的刘先生得知炸弹之事，告诉阮sir港府绝无可能向周雄妥协，阮sir表示已经安排警力，守备在会场的部分警力也调动过去，刘先生指示一定要在股市开市前拆除炸弹。

programme.title: 逍遥
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】讲述了生性洒脱的少女肖瑶（谭松韵饰）误入万妖谷引发风波，与万妖之王红烨（侯明昊饰）共同卷入神秘怪案。

programme.title: 爱．回家之开心速递
programme.desc: 故事主要围绕“熊氏一家”在家中的生活点滴和工作上的繁忙。

programme.title: 星河长明
programme.desc: 叶景清临终前将保护白露的使命交给了翼无忧，希望他前往天启守护白露。白露在天启努力寻找合适的吉址，最终选定了一个既不劳民又不伤财的位置，并得到了彧修明的认可。然而，这一举动引起了界海天和樊如晦的不满。另一方面，七海伶为了拯救夜北族民，心生杀彧修明的想法，并暗中联合他人计划行动。

programme.title: 多情城市
programme.desc: 以1960至1970年代九份为背景，述说三个拜把兄弟如何赤手空拳打天下，藉由上一代的爱情故事串连两代之间共同的情感与记忆，深度探索两代之间的价值观差异。

programme.title: The Case Of The Flying Toy
programme.desc: When Noddy sees Deltoid flying in the air he decides to investigate: how can they get Deltoid down? Realising that magic is involved, Noddy goes to see Queen Sparklewings to see if she can help but she tells him her wand has gone missing. Someone must be trying to do magic with her wand! Meanwhile more flying toys appear, first Fuse and then Smartysaurus.

programme.title: The Case Of The Spooky Noise
programme.desc: The Naughticorns have borrowed Noddy's music player to practise a special dance for Pat-Pat's Pumpkin Party. But when Noddy arrives at the party, the other toys are all scared by a strange noise. Noddy decides to investigate: what's making the scary noise? Using his investigating skills and following all the clues, Noddy arrives at the Naughticorn Stables where he realises that the scary noise is actually a slowed down tune on the music player.

programme.title: The Case Of The Upset Animals
programme.desc: Something upsets all the animals at the farm at night and no one can get to sleep . Farmer Tom asks Noddy to investigate before night falls so that everyone can go to sleep properly. Using his wwwbook to gather clues and using all his investigation skills Noddy travels all over Toyland to find out what has been disturbing the animals. He works out that the new stickers that PatPat gave to the the animals are made out of glow in the dark paper.

programme.title: Why Aardvark Has A Sticky Tongue
programme.desc: You see there was a time when Aardvark didn't have a sticky tongue. He had a long nose, big clumsy paws and he found it very difficult to eat. Then one day Aardvark's tongue got stuck in the honey log! All his friends pulled and pulled until KERPLING! Aardvark's tongue finally came unstuck. From that day on Aardvark's tongue was all long and sticky - perfect for eating yummy termites. Tales from Africa.

programme.title: Why Whale Spouts
programme.desc: You see there was a time when Whale didn't spout. Then one day there is a big storm in Tinga Tinga. The winds blew stronger and the ocean waves got bigger and bigger. Suddenly an enormous wave picks up Whale and carries her all the way from the ocean to the Waterhole. SPLOSH! But Whale was so full of water that she couldn't move! How do the animals help Whale get back to the ocean? For once, Elephant has the answer. Tales from Africa.

programme.title: Postman Pat And The Space Suit
programme.desc: It's a snowy day in Greendale, and Ted Glen has invited the kids to his workshop to meet his friend, space expert Professor Farrow. Julian's excited but so is Pat, who has always yearned to be an astronaut. He's even more thrilled when he finds that his special delivery is a space suit - an extra surprise for the kids. When his van breaks down in a snowy lane, he finds an ingenious solution - only to suffer a puncture - and Ted is unable to help...

programme.title: Postman Pat And The Stormy Birthday
programme.desc: It's Chris Beacon's birthday and he's looking forward to spending the day onshore and having a party at the village hall. Pat's SDS mission is to pick up all the presents from everyone who won't be able to be at the party later.

programme.title: Home Is Where The Hatch Is
programme.desc: Breeze and Roary swap places for the day (and night). Roary soon discovers the beach is no place for a racing car to live, while Breeze misses the freedom of the beach.

programme.title: Putting On A Show
programme.desc: The cars are all gleaming for this evening's race. Roary gets bored and heads out onto the track - with disastrous consequences. Will the cars be ready in time for the big show?

programme.title: Motor Mouth
programme.desc: The track inspector is coming to visit and Big Chris is too tired to commentate on the race. A celebrity commentator is brought in to save the day - much to Big Chris' anger.

programme.title: Dancing Queen
programme.desc: Christine is due to take part in a dancing competition and is practising at Silver Hatch. But what happens when her dance partner is taken ill?

programme.title: The Case Of The Missing Anchor
programme.desc: The Ninjas are giving a special display of acrobatics and climbing to Noddy, the Pirates and the Knights. It looks amazing! Noddy goes back to Toy Green to tell Big Ears all about it and narrowly misses being run over by the runaway Pirates Galleon. Someone has taken their sticky anchor and without it they've no way of stopping the ship! Noddy needs to investigate before there's an accident! He follows all the clues which leads him to the Knights.

programme.title: The Case Of The Disappearing Traffic Cones
programme.desc: When the Builders' traffic cones disappear from their building site, there is chaos all over Brickabuild. Noddy decides to investigate right away and find out who's taken them. Did the Naughticorns take them for their obstacle course? Or was it Farmer Tom who used them to keep his animals under control. Noddy carefully follows the clues and at last discovers it was the Pirates who took them to use as markers for Stripes' Pirate Galleon Driving Test.

programme.title: The Case Of The Disappearing Special Things
programme.desc: When Fuse's collection of Special Things goes missing, Noddy vows to track them down. He soon works out that Bling was in Fuse's Workshop but it turns out that she just went in to add a Special Thing to Fuse's collection. More clues lead Noddy to Smartysaurus. She admits she went into Fuse's Workshop but tripped on an oil can and fled when she saw all the mess she'd made. As for the Special Things, they'd already gone when she got there.

programme.title: The Case Of The Grey Coins
programme.desc: The Captain is upset because all of his shiny gold coins have been painted grey. It's a disaster as far as the pirates are concerned! Noddy decides to investigate. He realises that the grey coins are actually the gold coin covered with paint. They're not the only things that have turned grey too - Deltoid's shiny gold medal has been painted grey too.

programme.title: Easter Kitty Bunny
programme.desc: It’s Easter-time in the dollhouse! When Gabby unboxes an Easter basket with an orange egg inside, all the Gabby Cats want to know what’s inside, but when CatRat accidentally sends it rolling out of Kitty Fairy’s garden, Gabby and Pandy go on a springtime search through the Dollhouse to find it. Then, when the egg hatches, they meet Eggy, the Easter Kitty Bunny! For our Cat of the Day segment, Baby Box gets crafty.

programme.title: Dollhouse Detectives
programme.desc: There's a mystery in the dollhouse! When things start to mysteriously disappear around the dollhouse, Gabby and Pandy play detectives, using all their senses to find clues, follow them, and solve the mystery. For our COTD segment, CatRat and Baby Me-Owls show us how to make ice cube paints!

programme.title: King Burple
programme.desc: After Burple and Cutter crash-land in a village of tiny dragons, Burple's unintentional act of courage leads the locals to crown him as their king.

programme.title: Charged Up
programme.desc: Magnus's superpowered mechano-dragon threatens to replace the Riders. But when it spirals out of control, the town's real heroes have to step up!

programme.title: Driven to Distraction / To Bee or Not To Bee
programme.desc: When easily-distracted Luis is tasked with getting flowers for his grandmother's birthday party, TZG secretly keeps him on track. / When Rodney's honey bees escape from their apiary (artificial beehive), TZG secretly brings them back.

programme.title: Full House / Gift Express
programme.desc: Nicholas keeps stuffing oversized objects inside Eden’s fairy home. But it creates a BIG problem when Harper’s family wants to visit grandma and the car keys are nowhere to be found! / When Harper gets sick, Marcus builds a pulley between their apartments to send Harper treats. But when Qwak, the chipmunk, breaks the pulley, the Dews must step in to keep the treat train running.

programme.title: The Case Of The Missing Anchor
programme.desc: The Ninjas are giving a special display of acrobatics and climbing to Noddy, the Pirates and the Knights. It looks amazing! Noddy goes back to Toy Green to tell Big Ears all about it and narrowly misses being run over by the runaway Pirates Galleon. Someone has taken their sticky anchor and without it they've no way of stopping the ship! Noddy needs to investigate before there's an accident! He follows all the clues which leads him to the Knights.

programme.title: The Case Of The Disappearing Traffic Cones
programme.desc: When the Builders' traffic cones disappear from their building site, there is chaos all over Brickabuild. Noddy decides to investigate right away and find out who's taken them. Did the Naughticorns take them for their obstacle course? Or was it Farmer Tom who used them to keep his animals under control. Noddy carefully follows the clues and at last discovers it was the Pirates who took them to use as markers for Stripes' Pirate Galleon Driving Test.

programme.title: The Case Of The Disappearing Special Things
programme.desc: When Fuse's collection of Special Things goes missing, Noddy vows to track them down. He soon works out that Bling was in Fuse's Workshop but it turns out that she just went in to add a Special Thing to Fuse's collection. More clues lead Noddy to Smartysaurus. She admits she went into Fuse's Workshop but tripped on an oil can and fled when she saw all the mess she'd made. As for the Special Things, they'd already gone when she got there.

programme.title: The Case Of The Grey Coins
programme.desc: The Captain is upset because all of his shiny gold coins have been painted grey. It's a disaster as far as the pirates are concerned! Noddy decides to investigate. He realises that the grey coins are actually the gold coin covered with paint. They're not the only things that have turned grey too - Deltoid's shiny gold medal has been painted grey too.

programme.title: It's Purrsday!
programme.desc: It's Purrsday, the happiest cat day of the year, and all the Gabby Cats have a special purrsday surprise. Gabby and Pandy make peekaboo kitty paper chains with Baby Box, decorate a Purrsday cake with Cakey, Gabby gets a special kitty makeover with Mercat, and everyone sings a Purrsday song with DJ Catnip. For the COTD, DJ Catnip shows us how to make a DJ Catnip purr-stick!

programme.title: Doodlebook
programme.desc: Gabby unboxes a cup of crayons and a coloring book with the same doodle on every page. When she takes it into The dollhouse each of the Gabby Cats sees something different in the doodle and turns it into a uniquely magical drawing. But when CatRat gets stuck inside the book, Gabby and Pandy must go on a doodle rescue mission to save him.

programme.title: Stuff / Campout
programme.desc: When Kelp and Scallop discover Mr. Pearly has a cave full of stuff they help him to realize it could help a lot of other sea creatures. / When the group goes camping, Kelp helps Ollie learn that even though it didn’t go exactly as planned, they can still have loads of fun.

programme.title: Family Trip / Great Great Grandicorn
programme.desc: Kelp and Scallop help Dad discover the true meaning of family trips. / When the Great Great Grandicorn comes to visit, the kids learn that making mistakes is part of learning.

programme.title: Pupcakes \ Stink or Swim
programme.desc: When Tag discovers that Scooch is a great baker, she encourages him to start a pupcake stand. But when Tag rounds up more customers than Scooch is prepared to handle, Scooch can’t keep up with the demand. \ Tag and Scooch’s race to pick up the most trash on Pawston Beach is thwarted by Frank and Beans, who just want to make more of a mess.

programme.title: A Ball-For-All
programme.desc: It's Ball-entine’s Day, the day when the dogs of Pawston show their affection for each other by exchanging balls. But unfortunately, the town is fresh out, so Tag and Scooch set sail for Ball Island. \ If Tag and Scooch want to leave Ball Island with the balls they chose for their family, they must earn them by proving themselves ball-worthy, through a series of challenges from The Fetcher.

programme.title: Drillasaurs
programme.desc: Half dinosaur! Half construction truck! Full-on fun! Watch giant Ty Rux, his little buddy Revvit and the crew come face-to-face with evil D-Structs.

programme.title: Lucky and the Cousin Caper
programme.desc: Lucky and the PALs must rescue Julian after he gets in too deep while pledging a secret society at his school

programme.title: Tunnel Of Terror / Creature From The Croods Lagoon
programme.desc: Eep, Thunk, Lerk, and Womp set out to make it to the end of "The Tunnel of Terror" within the Cave of Secrets; After being rescued by a mysterious creature at the watering hole, Thunk tries to convince the Valley that a "sea thing" exists and it's not just his imagination

programme.title: Voice Fail Part 1 & 2
programme.desc: When Grug wakes up without a voice, he and Ugga go on the hunt to find his voice, while Eep, Thunk, and Gran stay behind. But when the Valleyites come to Eep with questions for Grug, she takes this opportunity to be a leader by pretending to have a conversation with Grug in their cave

programme.title: The Zippleback Experience
programme.desc: After heroes Hiccup and Toothless save Barf and Belch's life, the grateful Zippleback tries to repay its life debt and abandons riders Ruff and Tuff

programme.title: Snow Way Out
programme.desc: Determined to create a key to the Dragon Eye, Ryker heads to Glacier Island to find the dangerous Snow Wraith being protected by the Dragon Riders

programme.title: An Uphill Battle
programme.desc: The Dragon Knights make a deal for the Storm Wheel but first must obtain the other Storm Wheel from a mysterious mad scientist. Though Mastodon continues to warn the team about the dangers in using the Tianshang Weapons, they use them in a fight against Klaus and Veruca. The clash of the weapons wakes a dormant volcano!

programme.title: The Mad Scientist
programme.desc: The Mad Scientist turns out to be an ally called Akna, who has a history with Blade's brother Alfie. And Blade learns another truth about her brother and his mission. And in the course of a skirmish with Klaus and Veruca, the weapons change hands again.

programme.title: It's Purrsday!
programme.desc: It's Purrsday, the happiest cat day of the year, and all the Gabby Cats have a special purrsday surprise. Gabby and Pandy make peekaboo kitty paper chains with Baby Box, decorate a Purrsday cake with Cakey, Gabby gets a special kitty makeover with Mercat, and everyone sings a Purrsday song with DJ Catnip. For the COTD, DJ Catnip shows us how to make a DJ Catnip purr-stick!

programme.title: Doodlebook
programme.desc: Gabby unboxes a cup of crayons and a coloring book with the same doodle on every page. When she takes it into The dollhouse each of the Gabby Cats sees something different in the doodle and turns it into a uniquely magical drawing. But when CatRat gets stuck inside the book, Gabby and Pandy must go on a doodle rescue mission to save him.

programme.title: Dollhouse Safari
programme.desc: It's time for a safari adventure in the dollhouse! Carlita, decked out like a safari truck, takes Gabby and Pandy on an adventure through the dollhouse as they follow clues to find the mysterious Felis Catus and discover all kinds of other dollhouse wildlife along the way! For the COTD segment, Cakey and Parrot show us how to make adorable safari snacks.

programme.title: Mega Fat
programme.desc: After Mega Fat is fired from Baby Corp;he’s forced on the path of recovery towards being a Good Baby. However;Mega Fat is more interested in getting revenge on Boss Baby than finding the perfect family to adopt him.

programme.title: Halloween
programme.desc: Boss Baby uses the cover of Halloween Night to sneak into Bubeezee’s Headquarters to shut it all down. Tim covers for Boss by distracting Marisol with a night of trick or treating.

programme.title: Who's a Good Baby?
programme.desc: A brainwashed Boss Baby breaks free from overly sanitized Bubbeezee products. He rallies the Playgroup Babies to run the company out of business by breaking every product in town.

programme.title: Captain Underpants and the Bad Beat of the Blah Borelock
programme.desc: With fun in short supply, Harold and George persuade Krupp to dump the campers in the middle of the forest so they can learn to rough it.

programme.title: Captain Underpants and the Ghastly Danger of the Ghost Dentist
programme.desc: The pressure's on Harold and George to tell the scariest campfire story ever. Perhaps their tale of an ill-fated frontier dentist will do the trick.

programme.title: Captain Underpants and the Confounding Concoction of the Crooked Combotato
programme.desc: A fierce game of plot potato takes an unexpected twist when Melvin unleashes one of his most fiendish -- and carb-loaded -- creations yet.

programme.title: The Key To The Strip
programme.desc: The kids battle Shashi in Las Vegas as Shashi tries to take down evil billionaire Cleve and use Skeleton Key to create a new world order. Frostee has a plan to get Skeleton Key offline, but it only gives Tony ten seconds to take Shashi out and save the world.

programme.title: Escape from L.A.
programme.desc: Tony and his crew have been working as spy racers in LA for a while now and are itching to go international. Whey they discover a mysterious man with a strange tattoo of a formula in a smuggling ring bust, Ms. Nowhere finally agrees to let them go to Rio to investigate the tattoo and the whereabouts of one of her agents who has gone dark - Layla Gray.

programme.title: That Sinking Feeling
programme.desc: Ms. Nowhere drops the kids off in Brazil and leaves to go on her own important mission, but things immediately go south for Tony and his crew. When the hauler and gear gets caught in quicksand, Tony needs to learn that a good leader knows when to accept help.

programme.title: Crash Course
programme.desc: When a dangerous subterranean Cavern Crasher dragon invades the Fireworm Queen's underground nest, she approaches the Riders on Dragon's Edge for help.

programme.title: Follow The Leader
programme.desc: When Fishlegs discovers a hidden civilization of Albino Night Terrors beneath Dragon's Edge, he must craft an escape plan after they attack the Riders.

programme.title: Turn And Burn
programme.desc: Stoick, Hiccup and Snotlout search for Spitelout when he goes missing, and ultimately find him on a distant island battling a fiery Singetail dragon.

programme.title: Skullcrusher
programme.desc: When Jim is imprisoned in the Darklands, Blinky tries to decipher the Amulet to save him while Claire, Toby, and NotEnrique race to recover the Killahead Bridge before it's too late

programme.title: Grand Theft Otto
programme.desc: Toby gets secret transmissions through his headgear and his friends decide they need to infiltrate; meanwhile, Jim forms an unlikely alliance

programme.title: Kanjigaargh
programme.desc: Blinky, Toby and Claire make a dangerous trade with the Janus Order while Gunmar sets Jim up in a battle to the death

programme.title: The Lost City
programme.desc: With a map from the comic book, Po and Blade make the treacherous journey through the desert to the lost city, and once inside they find the guardian of the fire whip, Rukhmini. The mysterious figure, a stag named Colin, forges an uneasy alliance with Klaus and Veruca.

programme.title: The Last Guardian
programme.desc: In order to earn the fire whip, Po and Blade have to get themselves and Rukhmini out of a lost city with no exits, but Rukhimi’s not exactly who she says she is. Our villains’ alliance shatters when Colin realizes the weasels are mages with magical powers, and he leaves Klaus gravely injured.

programme.title: A Thread In The Dark
programme.desc: Klaus is injured and Veruca’s mage powers are not working, stifled by her time in prison. They encounter a dangerous village and Veruca reconnects with her abilities in time to save Klaus, but the two are soon captured by Po and Blade, who are unaware of Veruca’s rekindled powers.

programme.title: Terra Incognita Part Two
programme.desc: Aja, Krel, and Vex explore Earth looking for technology to repair their ship. When the high school Principal demands to meet Aja and Krel's guardians, the Royal teens transform two maintenance robots (Blanks) to pose as their "human" parents.

programme.title: Beetle Mania
programme.desc: When an alien beetle infestation threatens to expose their true identities, the Royals must depend on a new ally for help. Meanwhile, Zadra joins Morando’s army as a double agent who secretly spies on him for the growing Resistance.

programme.title: Mall Is Well / Taco Tank
programme.desc: Turbo competes in a crazy underground race through a mall.//Tito trades in his food truck for a tank and goes on a wild ride through the city.

programme.title: Zoo-Lander / Balloonatics
programme.desc: Shadow and Skidmark embark on a perilous adventure through the zoo to rescue Deuce.//Whiplash attempts to keep the crew from meeting his parents.

programme.title: The Case Of The Empty Swapsie Wagon
programme.desc: Cloppycorn is in charge of the Swapsy Game. Everyone puts a toy into the Swapsy Wagon and takes a toy out! It's brilliant fun - until the fairies yo yo. disappears from the wagon altogether. Cloppycorn's very upset. No one will trust him to pull the wagon again! Noddy tells him not to worry. He's going to investigate and help Cloppycorn find the missing toys.

programme.title: The Case Of The Unhappy Unicorn
programme.desc: Cloppycorn is very upset unhappy because his special felt ball, Snuggleball, is missing. Noddy needs to investigate quickly! He follows the clues around Fable Forest and discovers that PatPat broke snuggleball by mistake when she rode over it with her scooter. Noddy asks PatPat to make a new snuggleball but Cloppycorn doesn't like it. It doesn't feel cuddly like his special toy. Clever Noddy asks everyone in Toyland to give the new snuggleball a big hug.

programme.title: Why Parrot Can't Keep A Secret
programme.desc: You see there was a time when Parrot was the best keeper of secrets in the whole of Tinga Tinga. Infact Parrot couldn't open his beak at all! Then one day some beast dares to steal Lion's mane and Parrot sees the whole thing! But how is going to tell Lion?! Tales from Africa.

programme.title: Why Bushbaby Has Big Eyes
programme.desc: You see there was a time when Bushbaby didn't have big eyes. She had tiny little eyes and she was always getting lost. Strange things begin to happen and there are stories that Majitu the Great Giant has returned to Tinga Tinga. Young Bushbaby doesn't believe a word of it... and convinces the other animals that Majitu the Giant does not exist. "If you can't see him, he's not real". But then she does see the Giant and her eyes grow big as planets. Tales from Africa.

programme.title: Postman Pat And The Winter Games
programme.desc: The children are excited as there's a big Winter Snowdown on the fells.

programme.title: Homesick Tin Top
programme.desc: Tin Top just can't master corners no matter how hard he tries. The other cars try to help him to no avail… until Roary hits on a brilliant plan.

programme.title: Save Our Tree
programme.desc: Mr Carburettor is planning on cutting down Flash's tree. What can be done to save the poor rabbit's home?

programme.title: Noddy And The Case Of The Raining Carrots
programme.desc: Farmer Tom is having a Farm Fair at the Animal Acres Farm but it looks set to be ruined by an unexpected shower of carrots, cabbages and then pumpkins. Noddy and Deltoid investigate and discover the raining vegetables are caused by Smartysaurus, who is trying to find something heavy enough to go on the other end of her see-saw. She didn't realise that every time she sat on one end of the see-saw, she was sending the vegetables on the other end flying up into the air.

programme.title: Mission to CATurn
programme.desc: When CatRat gets stuck on planet Caturn, it's up to Gabby and Pandy to go save him. DJ Catnip teaches them a song to remember how to get there and Baby Box helps them make jetpacks so they can zip around. In the Cat-osphere, they take a twirl through Space Swirls and zip through the Supergallactic Doughnut Hole and even meet DJ Catnip's cousin, DJ Comet! For the Cat of the Day Segment, Baby Box and DJ Comet show us how to craft a papier-mâché Caturn.

programme.title: Belly Flop
programme.desc: The Riders have to save Elbone when he's swallowed by a giant Sea Gronckle, and Dak's awful cooking might be just the thing to do it.

programme.title: Game of Horns
programme.desc: At a big town festival, Magnus challenges Duggard in a competition to be chief of Huttsgalor! Can the Riders help their friend keep his helmet?

programme.title: Photo Day Disaster / The Eightful Eight
programme.desc: When Rodney heads to the Community Center for Junior Security Cadet picture day, TZG secretly helps him stay neat and clean for the photo shoot. / When Luis worries about his first ever math test, TZG secretly helps steady his nerves.

programme.title: The Glitter Guide / Piano Panic
programme.desc: When the Dews find out their glitter guide (an older Dew Drop) is coming to visit, they bend over backwards to make a great first impression, but end up forgetting some of their responsiblities in the process. / When a string breaks on Marcus’ piano before his recital and he can’t practice, the Dews must lead Marcus to a new piano.

programme.title: The Case Of Bumpy's Burst Ball
programme.desc: It's a play date afternoon in Toy Green and everyone is there having fun. Noddy has got a new ball for Bumpy to replace his old one that went missing. But when he finds the new ball burst in his secret cupboard he decides to investigate…. without letting Bumpy know what's happened. With Big Ears helping out by keeping Bumpy busy, Noddy and Revs are investigating against the clock to find out who burst the ball.

programme.title: The Case Of The Unfunny Clown
programme.desc: Noddy and his friends are having a "clown day" and everyone is going to play at being clowns. Noddy shows Fuse his smelling flower joke but Fuse realises he isn't programmed to understand clowning. The clowning goes too far when someone sets up a bucket of balls joke that almost causes an accident. Noddy needs to investigate to find out who is the unfunny clown before a ‘joke' goes too far.

programme.title: Captain Underpants and the Dastardlys Deed of the Devious Diddlysaurus
programme.desc: George and Harold decide to do an extra credit project on dinosaurs to help their chances of getting summer camp-worthy grades. When Melvin brings in a dinosaur frozen in ice, the boys try to get rid of it. But the ice thaws and they meet Diddlysaurus, a prankster raptor who's huge fans of the boys. He offers to help them with their project if he can pull pranks with them, but when the pranks go too far, the boys and Captain Underpants have to deal with the dino.

programme.title: Captain Underpants and the Problematic Pandemonium of the Punishing Plungerina
programme.desc: After helping George and Harold make a comic featuring the heroine Plungerina, Erica asserts that Plungerina could be better that Captain Underpants. To prove her wrong, the boys decide to actually create the villain in the comic and then have Captain Underpants save the day. Unfortunately, Krupp - and therefore Captain Underpants - is away at a principals' convention.There's no one to save them...until a real life Plungerina saves tthe day! But who is really Plungerina?

programme.title: Captain Underpants and the Angry Abnormal Atrocities of the Astute Animal Agressors
programme.desc: Stuck in separate camps, Harold and George unleash a hyperintelligent talking possum to scare the pants off of Krupp. What could possibly go wrong?

programme.title: RBC Heritage Round 1
programme.desc: The Heritage is South Carolina's only signature event on the PGA TOUR. It was first played 56 years ago in 1969. The venue for its entire existence has been the Harbour Town Golf Links at the Sea Pines Resort on Hilton Head Island. The original purse of USD$100,000 (USD$770,000 in today’s dollars) has jumped to USD$20 million.

programme.title: End of Transmission
programme.desc: End of Transmission

programme.title: End of Transmission
programme.desc: End of Transmission

programme.title: End of Transmission
programme.desc: End of Transmission

programme.title: Porsche Tennis Grand Prix (500) QF 1 & 2
programme.desc: The Porsche Tennis Grand Prix is a prestigious annual women’s professional tennis tournament held in Stuttgart, Germany, since 1978. As the oldest indoor women's tournament in Europe, it is a key WTA 500 event renowned for attracting top-tier players, played on indoor clay courts and noted for awarding the singles champion a Porsche sports car.

programme.title: 64' Debat
programme.desc: TV5MONDE's major daily news programme, decrypting the news! What you need to know: the Francophone view of the day's main events. Economics, social debates, international news: the expertise of our journalists. New weekend features: the French-speaking world, social networks, fake news, politics, sport...

programme.desc: Patrick Simonin hosts the stars in the headlines, culture, music, film, books, an unmissable rendezvous with all those who light up our times.

programme.title: Enquetes De Region
programme.desc: Travels to discover the regions of France. Through these territories, the investigations come as close as possible to the issues of today's society.

programme.title: Le Journal De La Rtbf
programme.desc: Complete international news roundup presented by the RTBF news staff.

programme.title: Maghreb-Orient Express
programme.desc: What's new in the Arab worlds? Journalist Mohamed Kaci hosts those making the cultural headlines in Tunis, Algiers, Rabat, Beirut, Alexandria, Dubai...

programme.title: At Monte Verita
programme.desc: The day begins on Percorso Vita, with a bit of sport, before embarking on a cultural tour of Centro Monte Verita, with its energetic historic sites. Then visit the House of Tea and taste the typical Ticino matcha.

programme.title: Le Journal Afrique
programme.desc: All the African news from the TV5MONDE news staff.

programme.title: L'actu
programme.desc: The televised news programme from TVMonaco.

programme.title: Le Journal De La Rts
programme.desc: All the news from RTS.

programme.title: Le Journal De France 2
programme.desc: The television news programme of the France 2 editorial board (8 p.m. edition, Paris time).

programme.desc: TV5MONDE's major daily news programme, decrypting the news! What you need to know: the Francophone view of the day's main events. Economics, social debates, international news: the expertise of our journalists. New weekend features: the French-speaking world, social networks, fake news, politics, sport...

programme.title: L'invite
programme.desc: Patrick Simonin hosts the stars in the headlines, culture, music, film, books, an unmissable rendezvous with all those who light up our times.

programme.desc: All the latest major events, presented, explained and analysed! Special guests and journalists in the studio analyse both the latest news but also other controversial issues to give us a better understanding of the social, political and cultural events occurring around us.

programme.title: Pistes Vertes
programme.desc: In Normandy, people from different backgrounds are committed to the environmental cause. They have one thing in common: they started by applying a few small ecological gestures in their daily lives before going further, until making it their profession.

programme.title: Un Si Grand Soleil
programme.desc: The Bastide, Estrela, Salama, Levy, Berville and Alami families, plus a host of supporting characters, live and work in the modern everyday city of Montpellier, in southern France. Between romance and crime thriller, with a blend of comic and serious themes, their stories weave a fascinating web.

programme.title: Managing Risk
programme.desc: Alexis and Thomas head to Sainte-Anne-des-Monts, where backcountry skiing must adapt to environmental challenges. They take care not to disturb the endangered Gaspesie woodland caribou.

programme.title: Fish and Chips Sandwiches
programme.desc: The chef revisits the iconic fish and chips in sandwich form. A practical meal that works for lunch or dinner.

programme.title: From Marseille to La Rochelle
programme.desc: From the south to the northwest of France, Anne-Catherine Verwaerde studies the inspirations and styles of the different coasts.

programme.title: 6h Info
programme.desc: The 6am news bulletin (Paris time) by the France Televisions editorial team.

programme.title: Telematin
programme.desc: The latest news and laughter, 7 days a week!

programme.title: Telematin
programme.desc: The latest news and laughter, 7 days a week!

programme.title: Fish and Chips Sandwiches
programme.desc: The chef revisits the iconic fish and chips in sandwich form. A practical meal that works for lunch or dinner.

programme.title: Slam
programme.desc: Three contestants compete on arrow-word grids that they try to fill in by finding the answers to the given clues. But to access the clues, they must first answer questions with a very particular characteristic: the answer is always a letter.

programme.title: Le Telejournal De Radio-Canada
programme.desc: The televised news programme from the Radio-Canada team.

programme.title: Managing Risk
programme.desc: Alexis and Thomas head to Sainte-Anne-des-Monts, where backcountry skiing must adapt to environmental challenges. They take care not to disturb the endangered Gaspesie woodland caribou.

programme.title: Ligue 1 Mcdonald's - Avant-Matchs
programme.desc: Presenting the next day of the French football championship.

programme.title: The caiman and the dog
programme.desc: The dog invited his friend the caiman to come for a meal and demanded, as custom required, that his guest be seated. But the caiman is incapable of sitting... Humiliated he returned home and prepared his revenge.

programme.title: The leaves
programme.desc: The High Priestess approaches the large cauldron and throws in a handful of amangnlina leaves. Suddenly, coloured steam rises from the cauldron to the amazement of the watching children.

programme.title: The dustbin
programme.desc: Watches, speakers, toilets... Maestro takes a fascinating look at some of our most everyday objects, both old and new. How exactly to they work? What is their history?

programme.title: Let's play game masters (part 1)
programme.desc: In Super-Cute-Land, Kaeloo, Stumpy, Quack-Quack and Mr. Cat play a new game every day. And for that they love nothing better than making up their own rules and asking loads of questions about the world around them: with this lot you can never be sure of what will happen next!

programme.title: Maotou paradise
programme.desc: Yann and his little sister Marina live with their uncle Patrick, a famous oceanographer, on a Polynesian atoll. The two children meet Oum, a mysterious white dolphin who's always keen to help those he likes. Their friendship sees them exploring the ocean depths together.

programme.title: The shark cage
programme.desc: Yann and his little sister Marina live with their uncle Patrick, a famous oceanographer, on a Polynesian atoll. The two children meet Oum, a mysterious white dolphin who's always keen to help those he likes. Their friendship sees them exploring the ocean depths together.

programme.title: Tout Le Monde Veut Prendre Sa Place
programme.desc: The game where everyone wants to be a winner. One quiz, six candidates and, comfortably installed in his chair, one champion... whom everyone dreams of unseating!

programme.title: Un Si Grand Soleil
programme.desc: The Bastide, Estrela, Salama, Levy, Berville and Alami families, plus a host of supporting characters, live and work in the modern everyday city of Montpellier, in southern France. Between romance and crime thriller, with a blend of comic and serious themes, their stories weave a fascinating web.

programme.title: Magazine

programme.title: Le Journal De France 2

programme.title: Wilderness

programme.title: Geopolitis
programme.desc: Analysis, explanations, neutrality... ''Geopolitis'' offers an unbiased in-depth look at international current affairs, with accuracy, precision and a constant desire to make an increasingly complex and conflictual world easier to understand.

programme.title: Le Mystere De La Chambre Jaune
programme.desc: Following the attempted murder of Mathilde, daughter of the Professor Strangerson, the young reporter Rouletabille head for chateau du Glandier to clear up the mystery. Who is the murderer? What is his motive? And above all how did he escape from a yellow bedroom which was locked from the inside?

programme.title: UCI Pro Series - Muscat Classic Final H/Ls

programme.title: Upper Austria Ladies Linz (500) Final

programme.title: Finals
programme.desc: The 2026 European Badminton Championships is the 32nd edition of the continental championship and will be held in Huelva, Spain. The tournament is used to determine the European champion in all five categories (Men’s Singles/Doubles, Women’s Singles/Doubles, Mixed Doubles).

programme.title: Porsche Tennis Grand Prix (500) R16 Session 1
programme.desc: The Porsche Tennis Grand Prix is a prestigious annual women’s professional tennis tournament held in Stuttgart, Germany, since 1978. programme.title: 以爱为营

programme.title: 市井豪门

programme.title: 声生不息·华流季
programme.desc: 以"华流国际化"为核心，《声生不息·华流季》以音乐对抗与融合为引，推动华语音乐走向世界。从金曲回忆到文化共鸣，跨越三代的声音在舞台上汇聚，用旋律唤醒集体记忆，谱写属于华语乐坛的自信新章。

programme.title: 长风渡

programme.title: 把关者们

programme.title: 山海夏味

programme.title: 去湘当有味的地方

programme.title: The Crew Builds A School / The Crew Builds A Waterway
programme.desc: It's the first day of school in Builder Cove... if Rubble & Crew can finish the building in time! / The pups need a construction solution to save Farmer Zoe's crops and to keep Crunchy the beaver from taking all the water!

programme.desc: Dora and Boots run into Swiper and his nephew Zorrito! They must make it home before Swiper and Zorrito can swipe their teddy bear. // Dora meets Boots' cousin, Sombrera, and they journey across the rainforest to find the special blue bananas!

programme.desc: Following a misadventure, Barbabravo is unable to transform at all. The whole family unites to help him. // Barbabravo can't stay put and is unable to focus one an activity for very long. Barbalala offers to teach him control. Will she succeed?

programme.desc: The Barbababies think their food can make them change colours and shapes. They decide to find the right food for each of them. // Barbabeau lacks inspiration, he can't create anymore. The whole family helps by suggesting new subjects to paint.

programme.desc: Dora, Boots, and Diego help a pair of spectacled bear brothers build an awesome nest for their Mami! // Dora, Boots, and Diego help a lost, baby lizard get home to its parents!

programme.desc: Tim distracts Tia when Tusky is in the washing machine.

programme.desc: A rockslide traps a Bat Family inside their cave, so the Pups have to free them! The bats search for a new home leads to problems in town though!

programme.title: Srinagar, India

programme.title: Antwerp 1

programme.title: Valencia

programme.title: Galle

programme.title: Nubra valley, ladakh

programme.title: Plitvice Lopar & Zagreb, Croatia
programme.desc: Alex Outhwaite explores the island life in Croatia, when she visits the charming Rab Island.

programme.title: Zanskar, India
programme.desc: From stumbling upon a statue of Guru Rinpoche to attending a local festival at a monastery, Alex explores the influence of Buddhism in Zanskar Valley.

programme.title: Brussels
programme.desc: Whether it is Manekin Pis or a quirky comic strip museum, the sights Elisha sees in Brussels leave her in awe of Belgium’s eccentric capital.

programme.title: 铁线功夫拳
programme.desc: 习武多年的梁坤为守护心爱之人本不愿再过问江湖之事，却因此导致心爱之人惨死，梁坤也就此明白江湖的真意。他最终在丐帮长老苏灿的帮助下重返江湖，力战群寇，成功为爱人报仇雪恨。

programme.title: 种鬼
programme.desc: 故事描述，计程车司机周通(高飞饰)之妻艾莲(玄智慧饰)红杏出墙，搭上赌场常客方明(徐少强饰)。一日，艾与方争执后独自离去，却被流氓挟往荒屋施暴，艾极力反抗，终堕楼惨死。周受一股神秘力量引导，发现艾尸首，蒙眬间，闻鬼语遣其往找巫师设法报仇。自始怪事接连发生，所有与艾之死有关的人均遭鬼怪缠扰...

programme.title: 茅山天师
programme.desc: 赤练君在押解过程中逃脱，张道长亦因此被逐出师门。为追查赤炼君的下落，张道长来到一个地方，发现有很多平民无故失踪。当张道长查出赤练君为练成蛇魔而抓走平民后，一场人魔大战旋即展开。

programme.title: 夜迷藏
programme.desc: 电影由三个恐怖短故事组成：一个男人收到死神通报后，设法避过死亡；男人因心爱的妻子去世后伤心欲绝，他的妻子变成鬼魂与他通灵；三兄弟在一次晚餐聚会上为照顾年迈母亲的问题而争吵，最后竟变成一宗可怕的谋杀案。

programme.title: 鹿鼎记
programme.desc: 韦小宝被反清复明的"天地会"被派到皇宫当卧底，受命查探四十二章经下落。韦小宝很快成为康熙皇帝的心腹，但他既要执行天地会的任务，最后陷入两难的状态。

programme.title: 开棺
programme.desc: 消失三年的鬼手及其盗墓团伙重现江城，再次下墓摸金。怎料四名盗墓贼在开棺时遇惊魂邪煞，逃离后又接连惨死家中。最终古墓尸毒和针孔成为留给员警沈春合仅有的线索，看似普通的盗墓案，瞬间扑朔迷离疑点重重。

programme.title: 窥情
programme.desc: 波子一夜用望远镜窥看家邻近四周时，揭发了一宗命案。但经警方调查村内居民，包括富商情妇Rita、邮差、纸店主老王及其妻子等人，揭开彼此间错综复杂的情欲关系之同时，还是不知谁是受害人，谁是凶手... 于是，波子决定用自己的方法继续调查...

programme.title: 见怪
programme.desc: 失明的游己任在离岛的工厂工作。一天，因飓风的破坏，工厂与外界隔绝。此时突然有一只怪物来袭，任何看到怪物的人都会化成黑影。因游己任看不见怪物，他能成功协助伙伴安全离开，更奋战反击，誓要杀死怪物！

programme.title: 大内密探零零发
programme.desc: 零零发是宫廷四大高手之一，专职保卫皇帝的安全。虽然不谙武功，却有着不寻常的嗜好：打造超越时代的发明。皇上被掳后，他靠着自己的过人发明救驾。

programme.title: 南北妈打
programme.desc: 关德兴年青时与李消云相恋，遭母亲反对，只好和周申玉结婚。关的儿子关仁坚工作上认识了文文。申玉发现儿子追求的女友文文，竟是消云的女儿。两个妈打情敌又一次碰头，再斗个你死我活。

programme.title: 激战
programme.desc: 曾经叱咤世界拳坛的拳王程辉，在澳门遇见了热血青年思齐。随着他训练思齐备战即将举行的混合格斗赛，程辉不仅重燃了对拳击的热爱，还重新找回了对生命的热情，并更加珍惜那些在生命中真正重要的人。

programme.title: 僵尸先生
programme.desc: 茅山师父九叔受委托为富翁起棺迁葬，祈求新墓地能催财。惟富翁之尸体出现尸变后，变成僵尸，并在村内四处为害。此时，九叔的两名徒弟亦分别被僵尸所伤和受女鬼迷惑。九叔如何同时面对徒弟们生死存亡，以及僵尸为害的问题呢？

programme.title: 鬼马飞人
programme.desc: 阿B为一名中学的体育教师，其执教之学校篮、足球队成绩甚差，学校下令他务必赢得校际比赛冠军，否则将撤换教练。阿B因头痛，误服同事研制之神药，变成超人，令球队屡次创造奇迹...

programme.title: 大上海
programme.desc: 黑帮头目成大器步步攀升至权力巅峰，却深陷两名女子的情感纠葛与特务机关的阴谋算计，并在战争逼近的威胁下挣扎求生。

programme.title: 唐人街探案2
programme.desc: 唐仁（王宝强饰）为巨额奖金欺骗秦风（刘昊然饰）到纽约参加世界名侦探大赛，比赛的内容是寻找杀害纽约唐人街教父七叔的孙子的凶手。两人再次组合侦破案件，并冒着生命危险闹翻纽约。

programme.title: 天才冲冲冲
programme.desc: 「寓教于乐」的大型综艺节目, 节目单元不仅推陈出新, 在生活中更能与三五好友, 一同尝试节目中的各项游戏, 亲身体验节目中的各项乐趣。

programme.title: 以爱为营
programme.desc: 财经记者郑书意（白鹿饰）为拿下头版几经努力争取和有名的年轻霸道总裁时宴（王鶴棣饰）进行采访，两人互相留下了深刻印象。最终阴差阳错的爱情慢慢升温。

programme.title: 非诚勿扰 12
programme.desc: 非诚勿扰是一档适应现代生活节奏的大型婚恋交友节目, 在广大单身男女提供了一个公开的婚恋交友平台的同时, 也迎来了新的当红男星作为新一任的非诚合伙人。

programme.title: 市井豪门
programme.desc: 一条街隔开两个世界。一边是努力生活有苦也有笑的市场人生，一边是勾心斗角有钱却战战兢兢的豪门日子。

programme.title: 声生不息·华流季
programme.desc: 以"华流国际化"为核心，《声生不息·华流季》以音乐对抗与融合为引，推动华语音乐走向世界。从金曲回忆到文化共鸣，跨越三代的声音在舞台上汇聚，用旋律唤醒集体记忆，谱写属于华语乐坛的自信新章。

programme.title: 长风渡
programme.desc: 自小受尽磨砺的徉州城布商之女柳玉茹与当地著名纨绔顾九思阴差阳错结为夫妻, 性格迥异的两人在错位婚姻里, 从相互抵触到相互扶持, 相互治愈。

programme.title: 把关者们
programme.desc: 故事围绕版权及商标调查科高级监督海锋（袁伟豪饰）、总贸易管制主任关佩欣（黄智雯饰）、海关毒品调查课监督温芷祺（王敏奕饰）与一众海关菁英追究原子弹、白粉等海关风波。

programme.title: 非诚勿扰 12

programme.title: 我想和你唱5
programme.desc: 《我想和你唱》第五季震撼回归！本季节目将继续升维星素共唱新玩法，通过搭档形式，让广大民众展现才华，演绎出多元的音乐风格。让我们一同感受大众力量的扩音，沉浸式体验音乐最本真的愉悦，让记忆中的美妙旋律闪耀发光吧!

programme.title: 山海夏味
programme.desc: 《山海夏味》通过市井美食和鲜味文化，探访街头小店的烹饪智慧与地域精神。节目打破精致摆盘套路，用生动镜头展现活鱼、热锅等原始食材冲击力，聚焦坚守在烟火中的普通人，呈现一方水土的饮食江湖与生活哲学。

programme.title: 去湘当有味的地方
programme.desc: 汪涵作为大哥带领沈梦辰、吴泽林网罗全省美食，借此展现14个市州丰富多元的湘菜味道，透过美食背后的故事，展现湖南各地独特的乡情烟火气。

programme.title: THE BIG INTERVIEW
programme.desc: For Nico Gonzalez, arriving at Manchester City on deadline day in February 2025 was a full circle moment. The son of Francisco Gonzalez, who amassed over 500 appearances for Deportivo La Coruna and went on to be a youth coach at the Etihad from 2016 to 2019, his connection with the Blue side of Manchester was a big factor in his transfer from Porto.

programme.title: MCI v ARS
programme.desc: We delve into the Premier League archive to bring you a Classic Match from the 2014/2015 season.

programme.title: THE BIG INTERVIEW
programme.desc: Antoine Semenyo's journey to the Premier League has been anything but straightforward. Starting his career at Bristol City, he had loan spells at Bath City, Newport County and Sunderland. Then, in 2023, the Ghanaian winger moved to Bournemouth and has never looked back. With 30 goals in four seasons on the South Coast, Semenyo established himself as one of the brightest talents in the Premier League and, this season, made the move to Manchester City.

programme.title: PL STORIES
programme.desc: We step inside the world of Tijjani Reijnders, joining him at home with his family in Manchester as he reflects on his remarkable rise to the top of the game. From his early beginnings to the bright lights of Manchester City, Reijnders opens up about the pivotal moments that shaped his career, the challenges he's overcome, and the ambitions that continue to drive him.

programme.title: PL STORIES

programme.desc: John-Boy undertakes an act of charity that exposes the family to the unexpected wiles of a most unlikely con artist.

programme.title: Wet
programme.desc: Detectives Benson and Stabler arrive on the scene where a woman is_x000D_found dead in Bethesda Fountain.

programme.title: 春闺梦里人
programme.desc: 季曼失忆后阴差阳错成宁钰轩夫人，凭智慧与经商逆转命运，并助夫君平乱获皇帝封赏。二人联手铲除恶势力与阴谋，历经坠崖分离与重逢，最终共度风雨终成眷属。

programme.title: 流行都市
programme.desc: 《流行都市》为观众介绍时令产品、健康养生、健体运动、护肤化妆、时尚服饰、婴幼儿护理、育儿知识、城中美食、饲养宠物等潮流资讯，内容包罗万有！

programme.title: 快乐长门人
programme.desc: 节目请来专业医生及中医，详细探讨长者要注意的疾病及都市病，提供预防及治疗的方法。营养师讲解饮食知识，从饮食中学习养生之道。

programme.title: 港生活．港享受
programme.desc: 香港人生活多姿多采，《港生活．港享受》既呈献高贵典雅的品味生活，也会带来贴地亲民的优质享受。节目结合多元化主题，每集探索不同范畴，并请来各行各业的精英分享成功之道。

programme.title: 东张西望
programme.desc: 《东张西望》星期一至日，紧贴追踪社会大事、趣闻逸事，并报导娱乐圈最新动态、艺人消息，以及剧集宣传和花絮。「今日突发」环节为大家追踪即日热门新闻；专题环节，深入探讨大众关心的时事、社会及民生问题，并访问相关的专家。

programme.title: 香港早晨 及 世界观
programme.desc: 报道香港、两岸及国际重要新闻。

programme.title: 谈判专家
programme.desc: 彭国栋与简洁是「警察谈判小组」内的梦幻组合，合作从未失手。私底下，栋对洁之大女人作风却不以为然。谈判小组招募新一届谈判专家，栋与洁各持己见。

programme.title: 爱．回家之开心速递
programme.desc: 熊树根是小型运输公司东主，与次女若水、三女心如以及长女的儿子金城安同住旧楼，惟心如与若水经常争吵，教树根哭笑不得。树根无视众人反对，力邀不修边幅的亲弟树仁搬来同住，怎料树仁竟无意间招惹了鬼魂龙璟风，令熊家出现翻天覆地的转变！

programme.title: Hands Up
programme.desc: 儿童节目《Hands Up》鼓励小朋友勇于发问，表达自我，向目标进发！吉祥物「酱汁家族」成员跟一众主持演出短剧，陪伴大家度过愉快时光。另会带来多首儿歌，让孩子们边唱边学习生活知识。

programme.title: Holistic way+京都念慈庵:正义女神
programme.desc: 高等法院法官言惠知调查一宗14岁少年高成彬涉嫌导致6岁男童坠亡案件时，发现其多次犯罪却因年龄未被追责。她主动降职至少年法庭裁判官通过引导教育帮助问题少年。

programme.title: 东张西望
programme.desc: 《东张西望》星期一至日，紧贴追踪社会大事、趣闻逸事，并报导娱乐圈最新动态、艺人消息，以及剧集宣传和花絮。「今日突发」环节为大家追踪即日热门新闻；专题环节，深入探讨大众关心的时事、社会及民生问题，并访问相关的专家。

programme.title: 兄弟帮
programme.desc: 《兄弟帮》是由一班「好兄弟」林盛斌、梁竞徽、王梓轩、范振锋及陈国峰主持的年青人清谈节目，每集邀请歌手、艺人或不同界别人士作嘉宾，进行轻松访谈，带来时下社会热话、流行文化、潮流玩意等多元化内容。

programme.title: Hands Up

programme.title: 爱．回家之开心速递

programme.title: 吴邪私家笔记 & 今日知多D
programme.desc: 吴邪解读帛书地图，与三叔组队探古墓，遇怪兽、铜鱼揭三叔往事，神秘女子阿宁现身后三叔失踪，新冒险展开。

programme.title: 我们家的料理
programme.desc: 失恋的亮亮为了证明经济能力将房间出租给热爱烹饪的阿治，两人在层出不穷的暖心料理中互相慰藉。这对性格截然不同的男孩一拍即合，在美食与陪伴中填补了彼此的空虚，建立起一段奇妙有趣的伙伴关系。

programme.title: 最强生命线
programme.desc: 都市人生活节奏紧张，压力又大，身体易出毛病，《最强生命线》为你解构健康之道。每集都会邀请医学专家讲解各种疾病的成因，还有物理治疗师，运动治疗师教做适当的运动。

programme.title: 综艺大热门24
programme.desc: 由幽默风趣的吴宗宪、陈汉典、黃路梓茵联手主持带您闹翻天！最强综艺节目保证娱乐性十足，让你笑声不断，千万别错过。

programme.title: 幸福来了
programme.desc: 高家兄弟因为价值观截然不同，不但成就高低立判，连教育出来的子女，个性和品格也大相径庭。上一代有上一代的恩怨情报，下一代有下一代的追求展望；在错综复杂的人生大道上，每个人都汲汲营营，寻找着属于自己的幸福课题。

programme.title: 多情城市
programme.desc: 以1960至1970年代九份为背景，述说三个拜把兄弟如何赤手空拳打天下，藉由上一代的爱情故事串连两代之间共同的情感与记忆，深度探索两代之间的价值观差异。
